summary_zh: 提出一种基于三维体积力模型的轴流压气机失速与喘振预测方法，通过局部气流角偏差划分失速/回流区并更新体积力场，在单级和三级压气机上验证，计算时间比URANS减少1-2个数量级。
method: 数值仿真，采用三维体积力模型，基于局部气流角偏差动态划分失速/前向流区域，单级和三级轴流压气机验证。
innovation: 提出一种计算高效的体积力模型，能捕捉三维非定常失速/喘振特征，计算成本远低于URANS。
conclusions: 该方法能正确捕捉失速和喘振特征；多级压气机仿真时间比全三维URANS减少1-2个数量级。
limitations: 未涉及非同步振动或旋转不稳定性，仅关注失速/喘振宏观现象。
relevance_reason: 论文研究失速/喘振预测，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但体积力模型可用于稳定性建模，对风扇/压气机流致振动有参考价值。

title: Stall Warning Strategy Based on Fast Wavelet Analysis in a Multistage Axial Flow Compressor
abstract: Abstract As a reliable stall warning strategy, the fast wavelet method was introduced to successfully predict the aerodynamic instability of a multistage axial flow compressor. One single sensor installed at each stage is proved to be sufficient to predict the stability status in a three-stage axial flow compressor. The whole prediction strategy includes the dynamic pressure signal capture, disturbance extraction using decomposition and reconstruction via fast wavelet transform, and stall warning index calculation based on statistical probability distribution. On this premise, the first occurrence of the stall in this three-stage axial flow compressor is predicted to be within the first stage, which is consistent with the stall route captured by the eight transducers around the casing wall. Thereafter, the stall warning index is used to monitor the stability status during the continuous throttling process. Furthermore, the validation using tip air injection and inlet radial distortion indicated that the stall warning index decreases as the compressor's stability improves. Conversely, the deterioration of stability causes the increase of the stall warning index. Thus, experimental results demonstrate that the stall warning method based on fast wavelet analysis can predict the aerodynamic instability in actual application.
affiliations: University of Chinese Academy of Sciences
Institute of Engineering Thermophysics

Advanced Gas Turbine Laboratory, Institute of Engineering Thermophysics, Chinese Academy of Sciences Key Laboratory of Advanced Energy and Power, Institute of Engineering Thermophysics, Chinese Academy of Sciences Innovation Academy for Light-duty Gas Turbine, Chinese Academy of Sciences, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, No. 11, Beisihuanxi Road, Beijing 100190, China
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 该研究提出基于快速小波变换的失速预警策略，用于多级轴流压气机。通过单传感器采集动态压力信号，利用小波分解与重构提取扰动，并基于统计概率分布构建失速预警指数。实验验证了该方法在叶尖喷气和进口畸变工况下的有效性，预警指数随稳定性改善而降低。
method: 实验方法，在三级轴流压气机上进行节流、叶尖喷气和进口畸变实验，使用单传感器和快速小波变换分析动态压力。
innovation: 提出基于快速小波变换的失速预警指数，利用单传感器实现多级压气机失速预测，并通过主动控制验证了预警指数的有效性。
conclusions: 1. 快速小波方法可准确预测三级轴流压气机的失速，首级最先失速。2. 预警指数随稳定性提高而降低，随稳定性恶化而升高。
limitations: 仅针对失速预警，未涉及非同步振动或旋转不稳定性机理。
relevance_reason: 论文研究失速预警，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及压气机稳定性，对理解流动失稳有参考价值。

title: Multi-scale nature of non-blade-order propagating flow disturbances in axial compressors
abstract: Non-blade-order flow disturbances, also referred to as pre-stall disturbances or tip flow unsteadiness, are closely related with compressor instabilities. The present work provides a comprehensive investigation on multi-scale nature of non-blade-order disturbances and the underlying flow physics in axial compressors. By applying full-annulus Unsteady Reynolds-Averaged Navier-Stokes (URANS) simulations, along with space–time correlation and spatial Fourier decomposition, to the disturbed pressure, the propagating feature of the non-blade-order disturbances is obtained. Further, a bridge between non-blade-order disturbances and the evolution of unsteady vortex has been set up. The results show that non-blade-order disturbances, featured as short-length-scale (35 modes across annulus), first appear as the occurrence of tip leakage vortex fluctuation, while the compressor still operates far from stall. Leading-edge radial vortex appears at near stall condition, and its movement induces a circumferential propagating disturbance overlaying on the one induced by oscillating tip leakage vortex. The interaction of the short-scale disturbances with a low-amplitude long-scale (of circumference) disturbance is observed, which results in disturbances with multiple scales of consecutive spatial modes, along with multiple frequency peaks in spectra. The compressor falls into stall as the circumferential nonuniform scattering of the leading-edge vortexes occurs. The densely- and sparsely-scattered leading-edge radial vortexes induce a high-amplitude long-scale (of circumference) disturbance, i.e. stall disturbance.

summary_zh: 本文通过全环非定常RANS模拟，结合时空相关和空间傅里叶分解，研究了轴流压气机中非叶片阶次扰动（即旋转不稳定性）的多尺度特性。发现短尺度扰动（35个周向模态）源于叶尖泄漏涡波动，近失速时前缘径向涡产生长尺度扰动，两者相互作用导致多尺度扰动，最终引发失速。
method: 全环非定常RANS数值模拟，结合时空相关分析和空间傅里叶分解，研究近失速工况下压气机流场。
innovation: 建立了非叶片阶次扰动与非定常涡演化的桥梁，揭示了短尺度与长尺度扰动相互作用产生多尺度扰动的机理。
conclusions: 1. 非叶片阶次扰动以短尺度（35个周向模态）形式出现，源于叶尖泄漏涡波动。2. 前缘径向涡的周向非均匀散射导致高幅值长尺度失速扰动。
limitations: 仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；未涉及叶片振动或NSV的直接测量。
relevance_reason: 论文研究旋转不稳定性（非叶片阶次扰动）的机理，但未直接涉及非同步振动（NSV）或叶片振动控制。

title: On the Divergence Mechanisms Analysis of a Vibrating Blade Subjected to Repetitive Rubs With an Abradable Coating
abstract: Abstract Aeronautical compressor fans, currently, operate with minimal blade–casing clearance. Therefore, this makes the occurrence of rub events very likely. Under specific circumstances, the blade undergoes excessive amplification of contact-induced oscillations, called hereafter divergence, which can be critical for the structural integrity of the engine. This article proposes an investigation of the mechanisms responsible for the blade divergence. Experiments are conducted on a fully instrumented laboratory setup, consisting of a single flat blade being moved toward a rotating cylinder to initiate interactions, while monitoring the vibrations and the evolution of wear on the abradable coating. Two synchronization mechanisms have been identified as facilitating the divergence: (i) the inherent setup synchronization between the vibration modes related to the horizontal and vertical motion of the blade; (ii) the preferential blade–coating interactions in the vicinity of periodically distributed irregularities of the abradable coating, which act as a source of excitation of the vibrations.

summary_zh: 本文通过实验研究叶片与可磨耗涂层重复摩擦引起的振动发散机制。搭建了包含单叶片和旋转圆筒的试验台，监测振动和涂层磨损演化。发现两种同步机制促进发散：叶片水平与垂直振动模态的固有同步，以及涂层周期性不均匀性附近的优先接触激励。
method: 实验研究：使用单叶片向旋转圆筒移动的试验台，监测振动和涂层磨损，分析接触诱发振动的发散机制。
innovation: 识别了两种具体的同步机制（模态耦合与涂层不均匀性激励）导致叶片振动发散，为理解摩擦诱发振动提供了新视角。
conclusions: 1. 叶片水平与垂直振动模态的同步是发散的关键机制之一。2. 涂层周期性不均匀性作为激励源，优先接触导致振动放大。
limitations: 仅针对单叶片和旋转圆筒简化模型，未考虑真实风扇叶片排和流动效应。
tags: 叶片流致振动抑制/控制
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶片摩擦振动发散，与风扇/压气机流致振动有参考价值，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Low-Noise Blade Design Optimization for a Transonic Fan Using Adjoint-Based Approach
abstract: The target of reducing the environmental footprint of the aviation industry has continually driven the need to design more efficient and quieter aircraft engines. In this paper, the aeroacoustic adjoint formulization for low-shock tone noise fan blade design is first proposed and combined with the aerodynamic adjoint analysis to develop an adjoint-based, multi-objective design optimization process for transonic fan blade design. High-fidelity numerical simulations are employed in the optimization loop to predict aeroacoustic and aerodynamic objectives and gradients. Aeroacoustic and aerodynamic design optimizations of an industrial transonic research fan are conducted using the proposed adjoint-based approach, demonstrating that the noise performance and the efficiency of the fan can be improved simultaneously. Results indicate that the significant reduction in the sound power level of the fan shock-associated tone noise is achieved by a compound leading-edge sweep pattern generated by the optimizations. Flowfields and acoustic results of the optimized blades are then analyzed to understand the noise reduction mechanism.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于伴随方法的跨声速风扇叶片多目标优化设计，结合气动声学与气动伴随分析，以降低激波相关音调噪声并提高效率。优化产生的复合前缘掠形显著降低了风扇声功率级，并分析了降噪机理。
method: 基于伴随方法的多目标优化，结合高保真数值模拟预测气动声学与气动目标及梯度，应用于工业跨声速研究风扇。
innovation: 首次提出用于低激波音调噪声风扇叶片设计的气动声学伴随公式，并与气动伴随分析结合，实现多目标优化。
conclusions: 优化产生的复合前缘掠形显著降低了风扇激波相关音调噪声的声功率级，同时提高了效率。
limitations: 仅针对激波噪声，未涉及旋转不稳定性和非同步振动；优化结果可能依赖特定工况。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
relevance_reason: 论文关注风扇叶片噪声优化，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动，但与叶片气动弹性及声学相关，对RI-NSV控制有间接参考价值。

title: Using tandem blades to break loading limit of highly loaded axial compressors
abstract: It is confirmed that tandem-blade configurations have potential to enlarge the flow turning in two-dimension (2D) studies. However, the potential of tandem blades to enlarge the design space for highly loaded axial compressors was rarely investigated in open literatures. The present work aims to show the capability of tandem blades to break the loading limit of conventional blades for highly loaded compressors. The 2D models of the maximum static pressure rise derived in previous work were validated by a large amount experimental data, which showed a good agreement. An E parameter was defined to evaluate the stall margin of compressor based on the theoretical models, which indicated that the tandem blade was able to increase the loading limit of axial compressors. A single-blade stage with a loading coefficient of 0.46 (based on the blade tip rotating speed) was designed as the baseline case under the guidance of the E parameter. A tandem-blade stage was then designed by ensuring that the velocity triangles were similar to the single-blade stage. The performances of both stages were investigated experimentally. The results showed that the maximum efficiency of the tandem-blade stage was 92.8%, 1% higher than the single; the stall margin increased from 16.9% to 22.3%. Besides, the maximum pressure rise of tandem rotors was beyond the loading limit of 2D single-blade cascades, which confirmed the potential of tandem blades to break the loading limit of axial compressors.

summary_zh: 本文通过实验和理论模型研究了串列叶片在高负荷轴流压气机中突破传统叶片载荷极限的能力。基于最大静压升二维模型和E参数评估失速裕度，设计了载荷系数0.46的单叶片级和串列叶片级。实验表明串列叶片级最大效率92.8%（高1%），失速裕度从16.9%增至22.3%，且最大压升超过二维单叶片叶栅载荷极限。
method: 实验与理论结合：基于二维最大静压升模型和E参数设计，通过实验对比单叶片和串列叶片级性能，载荷系数0.46（叶尖转速）。
innovation: 提出E参数评估失速裕度，并首次通过实验证明串列叶片可突破传统轴流压气机二维载荷极限，提升效率和稳定裕度。
conclusions: 串列叶片级最大效率92.8%，比单叶片高1%；失速裕度从16.9%提升至22.3%，且压升超过二维单叶片叶栅载荷极限。
limitations: 仅研究二维模型和单级实验，未涉及三维效应、非定常流动及旋转不稳定性等复杂现象。
relevance_reason: 论文研究串列叶片对失速裕度和载荷极限的影响，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及压气机稳定性控制，对流动控制有参考价值。

title: Compressor Stability at Pulsating Condition Via Gas Dynamics Responses Analysis
abstract: Abstract The compressor is operated at unsteady exit conditions in many scenarios such as the instability of combustion in gas turbine and denotation engine. The aerodynamic stability of the compressor is inevitably influenced by the unsteady operating environment. In this paper, a one-dimensional (1D) model that combines pulsation and unsteady responses of the compressor is developed to investigate the stability of the compressor system. The results show that the onset of surge and the transient responses of the compressor during surge are well predicted by the method. The amplitude of the component at surge frequency obtained by fast Fourier transformation (FFT) method is applied as a criterion to quantitively evaluate the onset and the strength of the surge. Compressor stability is enhanced at pulsating conditions due to the interaction between forced oscillation of pulsation and self-sustained oscillation of surge. An analytical model is established to understand the mechanism of the enhancement of compressor stability under pulsation. The change of total energy of the compressing system is proposed to evaluate the influence of pulsating conditions. Specifically, the energy change is reduced for pulsation conditions due to two aspects: the lower slope of compressor characteristic curve due to the lag-effect of compressor responses and the higher energy dissipation due to the nonlinear throttling effect.

summary_zh: 该文针对压气机在脉动出口条件下的稳定性问题，建立了一维模型结合脉动与非定常响应，预测喘振起始与瞬态响应。通过FFT提取喘振频率分量作为量化准则，发现脉动条件通过强迫振荡与自激振荡的相互作用增强稳定性，并建立解析模型从能量角度解释机理。
method: 一维数值模型结合FFT分析，研究脉动频率与幅值对喘振的影响，并建立解析能量模型。
innovation: 提出脉动条件下喘振频率分量作为稳定性量化准则，并从能量角度揭示脉动增强稳定性的双重机制。
conclusions: 脉动条件可增强压机稳定性，原因包括：压机特性曲线斜率降低（滞后效应）和节流非线性耗散增加。
limitations: 仅基于一维模型，未考虑三维非定常效应及叶尖泄漏流等局部流动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究脉动条件下的喘振稳定性，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及非定常流动与稳定性建模，对风扇/压气机流致振动有参考价值。

title: Stator Blades Manufacturing Geometrical Variability in Axial Compressors and Impact on the Aeroelastic Excitation Forces
abstract: Abstract The manufacturing geometrical variability is a source of uncertainty, which cannot be avoided in the realization of machinery components. Deviations of a part geometry from its nominal design are inevitably present due to the manufacturing process. In the case of the aeroelastic forced response problem within axial compressors, these uncertainties may affect the vibration characteristics. For this reason, the impact of geometrical uncertainties due to the manufacturing process onto the modal forcing of axial compressor blades is investigated in this study. The research focuses on the vibrational behavior of an axial compressor rotor blisk. In particular, the amplitude of the forces acting as a source of excitation on the vibrating blades is studied. The geometrical variability of the upstream stator is investigated as input uncertainty. The variability is modeled starting from a series of optical surface scans. A stochastic model is created to represent the measured manufacturing geometrical deviations from the nominal model. A data reduction methodology is proposed in order to represent the uncertainty with a minimal set of variables. The manufacturing geometrical variability model allows to represent the input uncertainty and probabilistically evaluate its impact on the aeroelastic problem. An uncertainty quantification is performed in order to evaluate the resulting variability on the modal forcing acting on the vibrating rotor blades. Of particular interest is the possible rise of low engine orders due to the mistuned flow field along the annulus. A reconstruction algorithm allows the representation of the variability during one rotor revolution. The uncertainty on low harmonics of the modal rotor forcing can be therefore identified and quantified.

summary_zh: 本研究针对轴流压气机中由于制造几何变异性引起的叶片气弹激励力不确定性，通过光学扫描建立上游静子叶片几何偏差的随机模型，采用数据降维方法表征不确定性，并量化其对转子叶片模态激励力的影响，重点关注低阶谐波激励的增强。
method: 基于光学扫描数据的随机建模与不确定性量化方法，结合数据降维和重构算法，数值评估制造变异性对气弹激励力的影响。
innovation: 提出从实测几何偏差到气弹激励力不确定性的完整量化框架，特别关注低阶谐波激励的增强，为考虑制造公差的叶片设计提供依据。
conclusions: 制造几何变异性可导致转子叶片模态激励力低阶谐波分量显著增大，增加强迫响应风险；所提方法能有效识别和量化该不确定性。
limitations: 仅考虑静子叶片几何变异性，未涉及转子叶片自身变异或非定常流动效应。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究制造变异性对叶片气弹激励力的影响，属于气动弹性强迫响应范畴，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Data-Driven Approach for Identifying Mistuning in As-Manufactured Blisks
abstract: Abstract Sector-to-sector geometry or material property variations in as-manufactured bladed disks, or blisks, can result in significantly greater vibration responses during operation compared to nominally cyclic symmetric designs. The dynamics of blisks are sensitive to these unavoidable deviations, known as mistuning, making the identification of mistuning in as-manufactured blisks necessary for accurately predicting their vibration. As in previous mistuning modeling and identification approaches, the mistuning of interest is small and is parameterized by using deviations in cantilever blade-alone frequencies. Such mistuning parameterization is popular because it can be applied through blade-to-blade stiffness deviations in computational reduced-order models used to predict blisk dynamics. Previous approaches to identify such mistuning parameters often require the identification of modal information or blade-isolation techniques such as blade detuning using masses or adding damping pads. However, modal information can be difficult to obtain accurately even in optimal bench conditions. In addition, in practice it can be difficult to isolate individual blades by restricting blade motion around the blisk or detuning individual blades through added masses due to geometric constraints. In this article, we present a method for mistuning identification using a data-driven approach based on a neural network. The network is first trained using surrogate computational data. Thus, the data-driven portion of the approach is executed using surrogate computational methods. With the trained network, mistuning in all sectors of blisks with the same nominal geometry can be identified by using a small number of forced responses and the forcing phase information from traveling-wave excitation. In this approach, no system or sector-level modal response information, restrictive blade isolation, or mass detuning are required. We additionally present a method for forcing frequency selection and response conditioning to improve identification accuracy. Validation of this approach is presented using a finite element blisk model containing stiffness mistuning within the blades to create computationally generated surrogate data. It is shown that mistuning can be predicted accurately using forced responses containing a significant amount of absolute and relative measurement noise, mimicking responses collected from experimental measurements. In addition, it is shown that mistuning can be predicted independently and accurately using different engine orders of excitation in regions of high modal density.

Department of Mechanical Engineering, University of Michigan, Ann Arbor, MI 48109

summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的数据驱动方法，用于识别制造态整体叶盘（blisk）的失谐参数。通过有限元模型生成训练数据，利用少量强迫响应和行波激励相位信息，无需模态信息或叶片隔离技术即可准确识别失谐。方法在含测量噪声的仿真数据上验证有效，且适用于高模态密度区域的不同激励阶次。
method: 数值仿真：基于有限元整体叶盘模型生成含刚度失谐的代理数据，训练神经网络进行失谐识别。
innovation: 无需模态信息或叶片隔离技术，仅利用少量强迫响应和行波激励相位，通过神经网络实现失谐识别，并引入激励频率选择和响应调节提高精度。
conclusions: 1. 失谐参数可在含显著测量噪声的强迫响应下准确预测；2. 在高模态密度区域，不同激励阶次可独立且准确地识别失谐。
limitations: 仅针对叶片刚度失谐，未考虑阻尼或几何失谐；方法依赖仿真数据训练，实验验证有限。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究失谐识别，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但对叶片振动预测有参考价值。

title: EXTENDING A VAN DER POL BASED REDUCED-ORDER MODEL FOR FLUID-STRUCTURE INTERACTION APPLIED TO NON-SYNCHRONOUS VIBRATIONS IN TURBOMACHINERY
abstract: Abstract This paper expands upon a multi-degree-of-freedom, Van der Pol oscillator used to model buffet and Nonsynchronous Vibrations (NSV) in turbines. Two degrees-of-freedom are used, a fluid tracking variable incorporating a Van der Pol oscillator and a classic spring, mass, damper mounted cylinder variable; thus, this model is one of fluid-structure interaction. This model has been previously shown to exhibit the two main aspects of NSV. The first is the lock-in or entrainment phenomenon of the fluid shedding frequency jumping onto the natural frequency of the oscillator, while the second is a stable limit cycle oscillation (LCO) once the transient solution disappears. Improvements are made to the previous model to better understand this aeroelastic phenomenon. First, an error minimizing technique through a system identification method is used to tune the coefficients in the Reduced Order Model (ROM) to improve the accuracy in comparison to experimental data. Secondly, a cubic stiffness term is added to the fluid equation; this term is often seen in the Duffing Oscillator equation, which allows this ROM to capture the experimental behavior more accurately, seen in previous literature. The finalized model captures the experimental cylinder data found in literature much better than the previous model. These improvements also open the door for future models, such as that of a pitching airfoil or a turbomachinery blade, to create a preliminary design tool for studying NSV in turbomachinery.

summary_zh: 本文扩展了基于范德波尔振荡器的多自由度降阶模型，用于模拟涡轮机械中的非同步振动（NSV）。模型包含流体跟踪变量和结构变量，通过系统辨识优化系数并引入立方刚度项，更准确地捕捉了实验数据中的锁频和极限环振荡现象，为涡轮叶片NSV初步设计工具奠定基础。
method: 数值降阶模型（ROM），基于范德波尔振荡器与弹簧-质量-阻尼系统耦合，采用系统辨识方法调参，并引入Duffing振荡器立方刚度项。
innovation: 在原有ROM基础上，通过系统辨识误差最小化技术优化系数，并添加立方刚度项以更精确匹配实验数据，提升了模型对NSV锁频和LCO行为的预测能力。
conclusions: 改进后的ROM能更准确地复现实验圆柱数据，捕捉NSV的锁频和极限环振荡特性；为未来涡轮叶片等模型开发提供了初步设计工具。
limitations: 模型基于圆柱实验验证，尚未直接应用于真实涡轮叶片或压气机，且未考虑三维效应和复杂流动。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文直接研究非同步振动（NSV）的降阶模型，属于NSV预测模型，与RI-NSV机理相关但未明确涉及旋转不稳定性。

title: Novel Method for Evaluating Intake Unsteady Flow Distortion
abstract: Closer integration between the airframe and the propulsion system is expected for future aircraft to reduce fuel consumption, emissions, weight, and drag. The use of embedded or partially embedded propulsion systems will require the use of complex intakes. However, this can result in unsteady flow distortion, which can adversely affect the propulsion system efficiency and stability. Relative to conventional measurement systems, time-resolved particle image velocimetry provides sufficient spatial and temporal resolution to enable the development of new methods to assess unsteady flow distortion. This work proposes a novel analysis approach to assess the unsteady flow distortion. For an S-duct configuration, the method was successfully used to evaluate the perturbations of the indealized incidence angle. This example showed peaks up to incidence and a duration equivalent to the passing time of three blades. The introduction of a nonuniform total pressure profile at the S-duct inlet increased the probability of peak distortion events with higher magnitude. The method provides an estimate of the likelihood, magnitude, and duration of distortion events and is a new way to evaluate flow distortion that could induce instabilities for the propulsion system.
affiliations: Cranfield University
Cranfield University, MK43 0AL, Cranfield, UK
summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于时间分辨粒子图像测速（TR-PIV）的新方法，用于评估进气道非定常流畸变。以S形进气道为例，该方法成功分析了理想攻角扰动，发现峰值可达三个叶片通过时间，且进口总压不均匀会增大高幅值畸变事件概率。该方法可估计畸变事件的概率、幅值和持续时间，为评估可能诱发推进系统不稳定的流畸变提供新途径。
method: 实验方法：采用时间分辨粒子图像测速（TR-PIV）测量S形进气道流场，分析非定常流畸变。
innovation: 提出基于TR-PIV的进气道非定常流畸变评估新方法，可量化畸变事件的概率、幅值和持续时间，优于传统测量系统。
conclusions: 1. S形进气道中理想攻角扰动峰值可达三个叶片通过时间。2. 进口总压不均匀会增大高幅值畸变事件概率。
limitations: 仅针对S形进气道，未涉及实际发动机叶片响应或旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气道非定常流畸变评估方法，虽与风扇/压气机流致振动间接相关，但未涉及RI-NSV机理、预测或控制。

title: Comparison of Turbulence Modeling for a Compressor Rotor at Different Tip Clearances
abstract: Due to the high Reynolds numbers together with the complex turbulent motions in turbomachinery, selecting a proper turbulence-modeling method is of vital significance in interpreting the real flow physics. In this paper, shear stress transport (SST) as a Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes model and scale-adaptive simulation (SAS) and zonal large eddy simulation (ZLES) as two scale-resolving simulation approaches were chosen to simulate the flow in a low-speed axial compressor rotor at three different blade tip clearances (1.3, 2.6, and 4.3% of chord length). Results of unsteady simulations at the design point were compared to the experimental data. The results prove that the ZLES model performs best in characterizing the experimental data regardless of the blade tip clearance size. The performance of the SST model in capturing the tip flow is close to the measurement data when the blade tip clearance is small, while the deviation from the experimental results increases with the clearance size enlarged. In contrast, the use of the SAS model does not result in any benefits over the SST model for the small tip clearance but demonstrates similar performance with the ZLES model for the configurations with middle and large tip clearance sizes.

summary_zh: 本文比较了SST、SAS和ZLES三种湍流模型在低速轴流压气机转子不同叶尖间隙（1.3%、2.6%、4.3%弦长）下的模拟性能。结果表明，ZLES模型在所有间隙下均最佳匹配实验数据；SST模型在小间隙时表现良好，但随间隙增大偏差增加；SAS模型在小间隙时无优势，但在中、大间隙下与ZLES性能相当。
method: 数值仿真：采用RANS模型SST和尺度解析模拟SAS、ZLES，在三个叶尖间隙下进行非定常模拟，并与实验数据对比。
innovation: 系统比较了不同湍流模型在不同叶尖间隙下的预测能力，揭示了SAS模型在中大间隙下的潜力。
conclusions: 1. ZLES模型在所有间隙下均能准确捕捉叶尖流动。2. SST模型在小间隙（1.3%弦长）时精度高，但随间隙增大误差增加。
limitations: 仅针对低速压气机转子设计点，未涉及非设计工况或旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶尖间隙对湍流模型的影响，与叶尖泄漏流相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Suppression of Nonsynchronous Vibration Through Intentional Aerodynamic and Structural Mistuning
abstract: Abstract Nonsynchronous vibrations (NSVs) arising near the stall boundary of compressors are a recurring and potentially safety-critical problem in modern axial compressors and fans. Recent research has improved predictive capabilities and physical understanding of NSV, but prevention measures are still lacking. This article addresses this by systematically studying the influence of aerodynamic and structural mistuning on NSV. This is achieved by incorporating mistuning effects in a validated linear model, in which individual blade modes are modeled as single-degree-of-freedom mass oscillators coupled by a convected aerodynamic disturbance term. The results demonstrate that both structural and aerodynamic mistuning are effective. While structural mistuning improves stability by preventing aero-structure lock-in, aerodynamic mistuning, which locally reduces the tip blockage and attenuates the aerodynamic disturbance causing NSV. In the latter case, the circumferentially averaged conditions are shown to be most influential, while the pattern plays a minor role. A combination of moderate aerodynamic and structural mistuning (1%) was also found to be effective. These findings are relevant for design decisions, demonstrating that small blade-to-blade variations can suppress NSV.

summary_zh: 本文通过引入气动和结构失谐来抑制压气机近失速边界处的非同步振动（NSV）。采用线性模型将叶片建模为单自由度质量振子，由对流气动扰动项耦合。结果表明，结构失谐通过防止气动-结构锁定提高稳定性，气动失谐通过局部减小叶尖堵塞和衰减气动扰动来抑制NSV。组合1%的失谐也有效。
method: 数值研究，采用线性模型，叶片模态简化为单自由度质量振子，由对流气动扰动项耦合，系统研究气动和结构失谐的影响。
innovation: 系统对比了气动失谐与结构失谐对NSV的抑制效果，发现气动失谐通过局部减小叶尖堵塞和衰减扰动起作用，且周向平均条件比分布模式更重要。
conclusions: 1. 结构失谐通过防止气动-结构锁定抑制NSV；2. 气动失谐通过局部减小叶尖堵塞和衰减扰动有效，1%的失谐组合即可抑制NSV。
limitations: 研究基于线性模型，未考虑非线性效应；仅分析了特定失谐模式，实际叶片失谐可能更复杂。
tags: 叶片流致振动抑制/控制
relevance_reason: 论文直接研究NSV的抑制方法，涉及气动和结构失谐对NSV的控制，与RI-NSV控制高度相关。

title: Global Optimization of a Transonic Fan Blade Through AI-Enabled Active Subspaces
abstract: Abstract The increased need to design higher performing aerodynamic shapes has led to design optimization cycles requiring high-fidelity CFD models and high-dimensional parametrization schemes. The computational cost of employing global search algorithms on such scenarios has typically been prohibitive for most academic and industrial environments. In this paper, a novel strategy is presented that leverages the capabilities of artificial neural networks for regressing complex unstructured data, while coupling them with dimensionality reduction algorithms. This approach enables employing global-based optimization methods on high-dimensional applications through a reduced computational cost. This methodology is demonstrated on the efficiency optimization of a modern jet engine fan blade with constrained pressure ratio. The outcome is compared against a state-of-the-art adjoint-based approach. Results indicate that the strategy proposed achieves comparable improvements to its adjoint counterpart with a reduced computational cost and can scale better to multi-objective optimization applications.
affiliations: University of Cagliari
Department of Mechanical, Chemical and Materials Engineering, University of Cagliari, Cagliari 09123, Italy
Rolls-Royce (United Kingdom)
Innovation Hub, Central Technology, Rolls-Royce plc, Derby DE24 8BJ, UK
summary_zh: 该论文提出一种结合人工神经网络回归与降维算法的全局优化策略，用于跨声速风扇叶片效率优化，在约束压比条件下，以较低计算成本实现了与伴随方法相当的改进，并具有更好的多目标优化扩展性。
method: 数值仿真，采用高保真CFD模型、人工神经网络与主动子空间降维方法，优化跨声速风扇叶片。
innovation: 将人工神经网络与主动子空间降维耦合，实现高维参数化下的全局优化，计算成本低于伴随方法。
conclusions: 所提策略在效率优化上达到与伴随方法相当的改进，计算成本更低，且更适用于多目标优化。
limitations: 未涉及非定常流动或气动弹性问题，仅关注稳态效率优化。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
relevance_reason: 论文聚焦叶片稳态气动优化，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动，仅与风扇叶片气动弹性有间接参考价值。

title: Aerodynamic Influence of a Bleed on the Last Stage of a Low-Pressure Compressor and S-Duct
abstract: Abstract This paper uses computational fluid dynamics to investigate the effect of an engine handling bleed situated on the outer casing downstream of the last rotor stage of a low-pressure compressor and upstream of the outlet guide vane and S-shaped duct. The model, validated against existing experimental data, utilized an unsteady Reynolds-averaging Navier–Stokes (RANS) solver incorporating a Reynolds stress closure to examine the unsteady component interactions. The results showed that at bleed rates less than 25% of the mainstream flow, the bleed effects were negligible. However, at higher bleed rates, performance was significantly degraded. A uniform flow extraction hypothesis was employed to separate the positional bias effects of the bleed from the bulk flow diffusion. This revealed that the bleed-induced radial flow distortion can significantly affect the outlet guide vane (OGV) loading distribution, which thereby dictates the position and type of stall within the OGV passage. Extraction of the rotor tip leakage via the shroud bleed, combined with the radial flow distortion, contributed to a 28% reduction in duct loss at 10% bleed and up to 50% reduced loss at 25% bleed. The actual amount of flow required to be extracted for an OGV stall to develop was 30%. That was independent of the bleed location and the type of stall. For bleeds up to 20%, the S-duct displayed a remarkable resilience and consistency of flow variables at duct exit. However, a stalled OGV deteriorated the radial flow uniformity that was presented to the high-pressure compressor.
affiliations: Loughborough University
Department of Aeronautical and, Automotive Engineering, Loughborough University, Loughborough LE11 3TU, UK
Department of Aeronautical and Automotive Engineering, Loughborough University, Loughborough LE11 3TU, UK
summary_zh: 本文采用非定常RANS方法研究低压压气机末级后外机匣引气对下游OGV和S形通道的影响。发现高引气率导致性能下降，引气引起的径向流畸变显著改变OGV载荷分布并决定失速位置和类型。引气率达30%时OGV失速，但S形通道在20%引气率内保持稳健。
method: 数值仿真，使用非定常RANS求解器结合雷诺应力封闭模型，验证实验数据，研究引气率0-30%对压气机末级及S形通道的影响。
innovation: 采用均匀流抽取假设分离引气位置偏差与主流扩散效应，揭示引气诱导径向畸变对OGV失速的定量影响，并量化引气对S形通道损失的降低效果。
conclusions: 引气率低于25%时影响可忽略，高于25%性能显著下降；OGV失速所需引气率为30%，与引气位置和失速类型无关；引气可降低S形通道损失达50%。
limitations: 仅针对特定低压压气机几何和引气布局，未考虑非定常气动弹性或旋转不稳定性等动态效应。
relevance_reason: 论文研究引气引起的流动畸变和失速，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及压气机流动稳定性，对理解非定常流动有参考价值。

title: Surge Prevention Techniques for a Turbocharged Solid Oxide Fuel Cell Hybrid System
abstract: Abstract Pressurized solid oxide fuel cell (SOFC) systems are one of the most promising technologies to achieve high energy conversion efficiencies and reduce pollutant emissions. The most common solution for pressurization is the integration with a microgas turbine, a device capable of exploiting the residual energy of the exhaust gas to compress the fuel cell air intake and, at the same time, generating additional electrical power. The focus of this study is on an alternative layout, based on an automotive turbocharger, which has been more recently considered by the research community to improve cost effectiveness at a small size (&lt;100 kW), despite reducing slightly the top achievable performance. Such a turbocharged SOFC system poses two main challenges. On one side, the absence of an electrical generator does not allow direct control of the rotational speed, which is determined by the power balance between turbine and compressor. On the other side, the presence of a large volume between compressor and turbine, due to the fuel cell stack, alters the dynamic behavior of the turbocharger during transients, increasing the risk of compressor surge. The pressure oscillations associated with such event are particularly detrimental for the system because they could easily damage the materials of the fuel cells. This paper aims is to investigate different techniques to drive the operative point of the compressor far from the surge condition when needed, reducing the risks related to transients and increasing its reliability. By means of a system dynamic model, developed using the transeo simulation tool by Thermochemical Power Group (TPG), the effect of different antisurge solutions is simulated: (i) intake air conditioning, (ii) water spray at compressor inlet, (iii) air bleed and recirculation, and (iv) installation of an ejector at the compressor intake. The pressurized fuel cell system is simulated with two different control strategies, i.e., constant fuel mass flow and constant turbine inlet temperature. Different solutions are evaluated based on surge margin behavior, both in the short and long terms, but also monitoring other relevant physical quantities of the system, such as compressor pressure ratio and turbocharger rotational speed.
affiliations: University of Genoa
Thermochemical Power Group, TPG-DIME, University of Genoa, Genoa 16145, Italy
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 针对涡轮增压固体氧化物燃料电池混合系统，研究喘振预防技术。通过系统动态模型模拟四种防喘振方案（进气调节、喷水、放气再循环、引射器），评估不同控制策略下的喘振裕度及关键参数变化。
method: 数值仿真：基于Transeo工具的系统动态模型，模拟恒定燃料流量和恒定涡轮进口温度两种控制策略。
innovation: 针对无发电机直接转速控制的涡轮增压SOFC系统，提出并比较多种防喘振方案，填补该布局下喘振预防研究的空白。
conclusions: 不同防喘振方案可有效提升喘振裕度，但需权衡系统性能；恒定涡轮进口温度策略在喘振预防上更优。
limitations: 仅基于仿真模型，未涉及实验验证；未考虑压缩机叶片振动或非定常流动细节。
relevance_reason: 论文研究喘振预防，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但喘振与旋转不稳定性相关，且涉及压缩机流动控制，有一定参考价值。

title: Study of the Effect of Air Injection On the Surge and Flow Characteristic of Compressor and the Pumping Loss in a Heavy-Duty Turbocharged NGSI Engine
abstract: Abstract In this study, bench tests of a heavy-duty turbocharged natural gas spark ignition (NGSI) engine were conducted with intake air injection at full load and different engine speeds. The flow characteristic of the compressor was revealed. The flow capacity of the compressor is reduced with air injection, and the reduction range increases gradually with the air injection pressure increasing at a constant speed, which would likely lead the compressor to surge. But the decrease extent of the compressor flow rate is improved as the speed increases, which reduces the tendency of surge. Based on those, prediction models for safe air injection pressure which can avoid compressor surge during various operations were proposed and then validated with experimental data. In addition, the influence of air injection on the pumping loss was also analyzed. The turbocharger efficiency is reduced therefore the pumping loss of the engine is increased during the air injection process. At 1200 rpm, the pumping loss efficiency of the engine without air injection is 0.25%, while it is increased to 1.83% with an air injection pressure of 400kPa at the same load.

State Key Laboratory of Advanced Design and Manufacturing for Vehicle Body, Hunan University, Changsha, Hunan 410082, China

summary_zh: 本研究通过重型涡轮增压天然气发动机台架试验，研究了进气喷射对压气机喘振和流动特性的影响。发现进气喷射会降低压气机流量，且随喷射压力增大而加剧，但随转速升高而改善。基于此提出了安全喷射压力预测模型，并分析了喷射对泵气损失的影响。
method: 实验研究：重型涡轮增压天然气发动机台架试验，全负荷不同转速下进行进气喷射，测量压气机流动特性及泵气损失。
innovation: 提出了避免压气机喘振的安全进气喷射压力预测模型，并基于实验数据验证，同时量化了进气喷射对泵气损失的影响。
conclusions: 进气喷射降低压气机流量，高压喷射易导致喘振，但高转速可缓解；泵气损失随喷射压力增加而增大，如1200rpm时从0.25%增至1.83%。
limitations: 仅针对特定重型发动机，未考虑不同工况或压气机几何的影响。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气喷射对压气机喘振的影响，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及喘振机理和流动控制，对风扇/压气机稳定性有参考价值。

title: Development of a Harmonic Balance Method-Based Numerical Strategy for Blade-Tip/Casing Interactions: Application to NASA Rotor 37
abstract: Abstract In this study, a frequency-domain approach based on the harmonic balance method coupled to a predictor-corrector continuation algorithm is implemented for the qualitative analysis of blade-tip/casing contacts in aircraft engines. Unilateral contact and dry friction are taken into account through a regularized penalty law. To enhance the robustness of the methodology, particular attention is paid to the mitigation of the Gibbs phenomenon. To this end, the employed Alternating Frequency/Time scheme features a Lanczos σ-approximation so that spurious oscillations of the computed nonlinear contact forces become negligible. This approach is applied in combination with a model reduction technique on an industrial compressor blade: NASA rotor 37. In order to assess the influence of both the contact law regularization and the Lanczos σ-approximation, obtained results are thoroughly compared to an existing time integration-based numerical strategy relying on a Lagrange multiplier-based approach for contact treatment and that was previously confronted to experimental results. Presented results underline the very good agreement between the proposed methodology and the reference time integration numerical strategy. The proposed developments thus complement existing results on blade-tip/casing contact adding a much needed qualitative understanding of the interaction and an accurate assessment of the contact stiffening phenomenon.
affiliations: Polytechnique Montréal
Département de génie mécanique, Polytechnique Montréal, Montréal, H3T 1J4, Canada
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本研究开发了一种基于谐波平衡法的频域数值策略，结合预测-校正延续算法，用于分析航空发动机叶尖/机匣接触。通过正则化罚函数处理单边接触和干摩擦，并采用Lanczos σ近似抑制吉布斯现象。该方法应用于NASA Rotor 37工业压气机叶片，与基于时间积分的参考策略对比，结果吻合良好，准确评估了接触刚化现象。
method: 基于谐波平衡法的频域方法，耦合预测-校正延续算法，采用正则化罚函数和Lanczos σ近似，应用于NASA Rotor 37压气机叶片。
innovation: 通过Lanczos σ近似抑制吉布斯现象，提高了频域接触分析的鲁棒性，并与时间积分法对比验证了准确性。
conclusions: 提出的频域策略与参考时间积分法结果高度一致，能够准确评估叶尖/机匣接触的刚化效应。
limitations: 仅针对单一叶片模型，未考虑多叶片耦合或非定常气动效应。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶尖/机匣接触的数值方法，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及叶片振动和流固耦合，对风扇/压气机流致振动有参考价值。

title: Assessment of Geometric Nonlinearities Influence On NASA Rotor 37 Response to Blade Tip/Casing Rubbing Events
abstract: Abstract This paper uses a recently derived reduction procedure to study the contact interactions of an industrial blade undergoing large displacements. The reduction technique consists in projecting the dynamical problem onto a reduction basis composed of Craig-Bampton modes and a selection of their modal derivatives. The internal nonlinear forces due to large displacements are evaluated with the stiffness evaluation procedure and contact is numerically handled using Lagrange multipliers. The numerical strategy is applied on an open industrial compressor blade model based on the NASA rotor 37 blade in order to promote reproducibility of results. Two contact scenarios are investigated: one with direct contact between the blade and the casing and one with an abradable material deposited on the casing. The influence of geometric nonlinearities is assessed in both cases. In particular, contact interaction maps and abradable coating wear pattern maps are used to identify the main interactions that can be detrimental for the engine integrity.

Department of Aerospace and Mechanical Engineering, University of Liège, 4000 Liège, Belgium
Polytechnique Montréal
Département de génie mécanique, Polytechnique Montréal, Montréal H3T 1J4, Canada

summary_zh: 本文采用降阶方法研究NASA转子37叶片在叶尖/机匣碰摩事件中的接触动力学，考虑几何非线性大位移影响。通过Craig-Bampton模态及其模态导数投影动力学问题，用刚度评估法处理非线性内力，拉格朗日乘子处理接触。分析了直接接触和可磨耗涂层两种场景，利用接触交互图和磨损模式图识别对发动机完整性有害的相互作用。
method: 数值仿真：基于Craig-Bampton模态和模态导数的降阶模型，结合刚度评估法和拉格朗日乘子处理接触。工况包括直接接触和可磨耗涂层两种碰摩场景。
innovation: 将模态导数引入降阶模型以考虑几何非线性，并应用于工业压缩机叶片碰摩问题，提供可复现的NASA转子37模型。
conclusions: 几何非线性显著影响碰摩响应，接触交互图和磨损模式图可识别关键相互作用，对发动机完整性评估有重要意义。
limitations: 仅针对单一叶片模型和特定碰摩场景，未考虑气动载荷或旋转效应。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶片碰摩引起的振动，属于叶片流致振动控制范畴，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Investigation on the Robustness of Rotor/Stator Contact Interactions With Respect to Small Mistuning
abstract: Abstract In this work, the impact of small mistuning on rotor/stator contact interactions is investigated. First, a detailed study of a rotor/stator interaction between the first bending modes and the second engine order is presented in the tuned case. Then, a numerical investigation on the effect of mistuning on the studied rotor/stator contact interaction is carried out. In particular, a stochastic analysis is performed to evaluate the robustness of the interaction with respect to the mistuning level. Simulations are conducted using a reducedo rder model (ROM) of an industrial-bladed disk that combines both physical degrees-of-freedom (along blades tip for contact treatment) and modal coordinates. Mistuning is introduced in the tuned ROM by means of a modified version of the component mode mistuning method that allows to keep physical degrees-of-freedom within the reduced basis. Nonlinear amplification factors, i.e., the amplification factors in the context of contact nonlinearities, are compared with their linear counterparts, and the latter are computed using a linear forcing on each blade using a two nodal diameters traveling wave excitation on the mistuned and the tuned bladed disk. The comparison between the linear and nonlinear amplification factor for each sample highlights that no correlation exists between a mistuning pattern leading to high amplifications in a linear context or when contact nonlinearities are taken into account. Therefore, dedicated analyses on the effect of mistuning should be undertaken with contact nonlinearities considerations at the design stage especially if intentional mistuning is considered.
affiliations: Polytechnique Montréal
Département de génie mécanique, École Polytechnique de Montréal, Montréal H3T 1J4, QC, Canada
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文研究了小失谐对转子/定子接触相互作用的影响。首先分析了调谐情况下第一弯曲模态与第二发动机阶次之间的相互作用，然后通过随机分析评估了失谐水平对接触相互作用的鲁棒性。采用结合物理自由度和模态坐标的工业叶盘降阶模型进行仿真，发现线性与非线性放大因子之间无相关性，表明在设计阶段需考虑接触非线性的失谐效应。
method: 数值仿真，采用降阶模型（ROM）结合物理自由度和模态坐标，通过改进的组件模态失谐方法引入失谐，进行随机分析。
innovation: 揭示了线性与非线性（接触）放大因子之间无相关性，强调在考虑接触非线性时需专门分析失谐效应，为失谐设计提供新视角。
conclusions: 1. 线性与非线性放大因子之间无相关性，即导致线性高放大的失谐模式在接触非线性下不一定高放大。2. 设计阶段应考虑接触非线性对失谐的影响，尤其是有意失谐时。
limitations: 仅针对特定模态（第一弯曲）和发动机阶次（第二阶），未涉及其他模态或工况。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究失谐对转子/定子接触相互作用的影响，属于叶片振动与失谐领域，但与RI-NSV机理、预测或控制无直接关联。

title: Incipient Surge Analysis in Time and Frequency Domain for Centrifugal Compressors
abstract: Abstract The use of centrifugal compressors has been increasing tremendously in the last decade as they are a key component in the present energy scenario both in the modern internal combustion engine design and in advanced cycles and innovative plant layouts as fuel cell systems. Instability phenomena limit the operating range of the whole compressor system, especially during fast transients. The target is therefore to extend the minimum flow limit in order to improve the operability of each unit while avoiding compressor surge operation and guaranteeing safe operation. For this reason, it is necessary to develop a monitoring system capable of preventing surge and extending the operating range of these machines, their performance, and reliability to allow the integration with the other plant components. The experimental investigation carried out at the University of Genoa turbocharger test facility and presented in this work, consists of steady-state and transient measurements used to characterize and identify compressor behavior in correspondence of surge inception conditions to determine different techniques which could represent surge precursors. The data analysis concentrates on pressure and vibro-acoustic signals by applying different signal processing techniques in the time and frequency domain to classify compressor operation as stable or unstable. The cross correlation function and wavelet analysis have been identified as techniques to define a precursor able to detect incipient surge conditions. Through cross correlation function analysis, it has been possible to identify the presence of propagation phenomena in the system and to evaluate how these events become more significant near an unstable low-mass flow rate condition. At low mass flow rate condition, spikes of significant amplitude are well detectable in the cross correlation function indicating the rise of significant random content in the system responses associated with the rise of incipient surge condition. Additionally, the continuous wavelet transform has been applied to operational signals to show how their time-dependent spectral structure responses can highlight the rise of unstable phenomena, not easily identifiable with traditional signal processing techniques. Exploiting its features in terms of good frequency and time resolution allowed us to identify different contents in system responses regarding phenomena that take place close to surge line and were able to detect their nature in conditions very close to deep surge ones (e.g., rotating stall with its intermitting characteristic nature). Moreover, system response was studied in high frequency range and through a demodulation technique, it was found how blade passes frequency energy content change interacting with rotating stall inception, moving close to surge line. The obtained results provide an interesting diagnostic and predictive solution to detect compressor instabilities at low mass flow rate operating conditions and to prevent compressor fails.

DIME, Internal Combustion Engines Group (ICEG), University of Genoa, Genova 16145, Italy
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 该研究通过实验测量离心压缩机稳态和瞬态工况下的压力与振动声学信号，采用时频域信号处理技术（互相关函数、连续小波变换、解调）分析喘振先兆，发现互相关函数中的尖峰可指示旋转失速和喘振的起始，且叶片通过频率能量变化与旋转失速相互作用。
method: 实验研究，在热那亚大学涡轮增压器试验台上进行稳态和瞬态测量，分析压力与振动声学信号，采用互相关函数、连续小波变换和解调技术。
innovation: 利用互相关函数和连续小波变换识别喘振先兆，特别是通过互相关函数检测传播现象和随机成分，以及通过解调技术分析叶片通过频率能量变化与旋转失速的相互作用。
conclusions: 互相关函数中的尖峰可指示喘振起始；连续小波变换能识别传统方法难以发现的失稳现象，如旋转失速的间歇性特征。
limitations: 研究基于特定离心压缩机试验台，结果可能不直接适用于轴流压气机或不同尺寸的压缩机。
relevance_reason: 论文研究离心压缩机喘振先兆，涉及旋转失速和喘振机理，但未直接研究旋转不稳定性导致的非同步振动（RI-NSV），因此评分为3。

title: Forced Response Excitation Due to the Stator Vanes of Two and Three Compressor Stages Away
abstract: Abstract State-of-the-art axial compressors of gas turbines employed in power generation plants and aero engines should have both high efficiency and small footprint. Thus, compressors are designed to have thin rotor blades and stator vanes with short axial distances. Recently, problems of high cycle fatigue (HCF) associated with forced response excitation have gradually increased as a result of these trends. Rotor blade fatigue can be caused not only by the wake and potential effect of the adjacent stator vane, but also by the stator vanes of two, three, or four compressor stages away. Thus, accurate prediction and suppression methods are necessary in the design process. In this study, the problem of rotor blade vibration caused by the stator vanes of two and three compressor stages away is studied. In the first part of the study, one-way fluid structure interaction (FSI) simulation is carried out. To validate the accuracy of the simulation, experiments are also conducted using a gas turbine test facility. It is found that one-way FSI simulation can accurately predict the order of the vibration level. In the second part of the study, a method of controlling the blade vibration is investigated by optimizing the clocking of the stator vanes. It is confirmed that the vibration amplitude can be effectively suppressed without reducing the performance. Through this study, ways to evaluate and control the rotor blade vibration are validated.

Technical Institute, Kawasaki Heavy Industries, Co., Ltd., Akashi, Hyogo 673 8666, Japan
Aerospace Systems Company, Kawasaki Heavy Industries, Co., Ltd., Akashi, Hyogo 673 8666, Japan
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本研究针对燃气轮机轴流压气机中由远距离静叶（两到三级之外）引起的转子叶片强迫响应振动问题，采用单向流固耦合仿真和实验验证，发现该方法能准确预测振动量级，并通过优化静叶周向布局有效抑制振动而不降低性能。
method: 单向流固耦合数值仿真与燃气轮机试验台实验验证，研究多级静叶对转子叶片的强迫响应激励。
innovation: 揭示了远离转子的多级静叶（两到三级之外）对转子叶片振动的显著影响，并提出了通过静叶周向布局优化抑制振动的方法。
conclusions: 单向流固耦合仿真可准确预测振动量级；优化静叶周向布局能有效抑制转子叶片振动且不降低性能。
limitations: 仅针对强迫响应，未涉及非同步振动或旋转不稳定性；实验工况可能有限。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
叶片流致振动抑制/控制
relevance_reason: 论文研究压气机叶片强迫响应振动及其控制，与RI-NSV机理无直接关联，但涉及流致振动预测与控制，对风扇/压气机振动问题有参考价值。

title: Foam-Metal Casing Treatment on an Axial Flow Compressor: Stability Improvement and Noise Reduction
abstract: Abstract A set of foam metal casing treatment (FMCT) has been investigated to assess the stability improvement and noise reduction on an axial compressor. Three FMCTs with different PPI (Pores Per Inch), 20, 35, and 50, are tested experimentally. Two installation locations of foam metal in the casing are also considered and investigated. At location 1, it is found that the FMCT improves the stall margin by 5.4–8.7%, and the attenuation of compressor noise is up to 5 dB. At location 2, the stall margin is extended by 22.2–37.1% but increasing the noise mostly. Besides, foam metal at location 1 causes less efficiency loss than that at location 2. Based on the analysis in near-casing pressure distribution, spanwise performance comparison, and stall process, the mechanism of the FMCT for enhancing the compressor stability is also discussed.
affiliations: Beihang University
School of Energy and Power Engineering, Beihang University, No. 37 Xueyuan Road, Haidian District, Beijing 100191, China
summary_zh: 研究泡沫金属机匣处理（FMCT）对轴流压气机稳定性和噪声的影响。实验测试了三种不同PPI（20、35、50）的FMCT及两种安装位置。位置1使失速裕度提高5.4-8.7%，噪声降低5 dB；位置2使失速裕度提高22.2-37.1%但噪声增加。位置1效率损失更小。通过近机匣压力分布、展向性能及失速过程分析，探讨了FMCT增强稳定性的机理。
method: 实验研究，测试三种PPI（20、35、50）的泡沫金属机匣处理，两种安装位置，测量失速裕度、噪声及效率。
innovation: 首次系统研究泡沫金属机匣处理对轴流压气机稳定性和噪声的综合影响，并对比不同PPI和安装位置的效果。
conclusions: 1. 位置1的FMCT可提高失速裕度5.4-8.7%并降噪5 dB；2. 位置2的FMCT可提高失速裕度22.2-37.1%但增加噪声。
limitations: 仅针对单级低速轴流压气机，未涉及高速或多级压气机，且未研究对非同步振动的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究机匣处理对压气机稳定性的影响，与旋转不稳定性和非同步振动间接相关，但未直接涉及NSV。

title: Interpretation of Stall Precursor Signatures
abstract: Abstract Unsteady aerodynamic phenomena appearing close to the stall boundary in axial fans and compressors have been the subject of extensive investigations. A particular phenomenon known as “rotating instabilities” typically occurs in the tip region at highly loaded conditions and is often linked to blade vibrations. During rig and engine testing, it is usually identified by the characteristic shape of its pressure spectra. In the 1990s, this shape has been explained as the result of a circumferentially propagating disturbance, which is unsteady in a frame of reference rotating with the disturbance. In this analysis, conclusions regarding its propagation speed and frequency have been made based on the analysis of spectral peaks, and this method is still often used to classify unsteady aerodynamic phenomena. However, in high subsonic and transonic machines, where aeroacoustic and aeroelastic phenomena interact with aerodynamic disturbances, the interpretation of measurements using spectra alone is challenging. The present article aims to demonstrate the difficulties and subtleties associated with the analysis of measurement signals, which need to be overcome to correctly interpret stall precursor signatures. At the example of a recent investigation on a composite fan, the consequences of sensor placement and postprocessing techniques are discussed with a focus on spectral averaging, isolation of non-synchronous phenomena, and multisensor cross correlation methods. It is seen that the interpretation of phenomena based solely on spectral peaks and their spacing can be misleading and that the characteristic features of a rotating instability spectrum do not require an unstable pulsating disturbance.

summary_zh: 本文以复合风扇为例，探讨了轴流压气机近失速边界非定常气动现象（如旋转不稳定性）的测量信号解释问题。重点分析了传感器布置、谱平均、非同步现象隔离及多传感器互相关方法，指出仅依赖谱峰特征解释旋转不稳定性可能产生误导。
method: 实验测量为主，结合信号后处理技术（谱平均、互相关等），研究对象为复合风扇，工况为近失速高负荷。
innovation: 揭示了仅凭谱峰特征解释旋转不稳定性的局限性，强调需结合多传感器互相关等方法正确识别失速前兆信号。
conclusions: 1. 旋转不稳定性谱的典型特征不一定需要不稳定的脉动扰动。2. 基于谱峰及其间距的解释可能误导，需采用更精细的信号处理方法。
limitations: 未涉及具体控制方法，且结论基于特定复合风扇，通用性需进一步验证。
relevance_reason: 论文聚焦旋转不稳定性（RI）的测量与解释，但未直接研究其导致的非同步振动（NSV）或控制方法。

title: Turbulence Measurements at the Inlet of an Automotive Turbocharger Compressor Using Stereoscopic Particle Image Velocimetry
abstract: Abstract The present work uses stereoscopic particle image velocimetry (SPIV) to analyze the compressor inlet flow field, with specific emphasis on its turbulence characteristics during flow reversal in order to gain further insight into the inlet flow structures. SPIV experiments were carried out at the inlet of a centrifugal compressor without any recirculation channel at four different rotational speeds (from 80 to 140 krpm) and over the entire mass flow range (from choke to surge) at each speed. Detailed analyses have been carried out for the mean velocity field, the mean vorticity field, and the turbulent statistics including turbulent kinetic energy, Reynolds stress, and the one-dimensional energy spectra. The turbulent kinetic energy at the compressor inlet was observed to increase rapidly along a speed line with decreasing mass flowrate once flow reversal started, and the turbulence became more anisotropic. As the flowrate was reduced (along a speed line), the zone with maximum turbulent kinetic energy moved from the periphery toward the center of the inlet duct and also occurred further upstream from the impeller. The Reynolds stress distributions suggest that the Boussinesq assumption of an isotropic eddy viscosity may not be appropriate after the detection of flow reversal. The Reynolds shear stresses were observed to change signs with their corresponding velocity gradients at the tested mass flowrates at different rotational speeds. At the investigated flowrates, the radial gradients in the axial and tangential velocities were found to be most dominant.
affiliations: The Ohio State University
Department of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering, The Ohio State University, 930 Kinnear Road, Columbus, OH 43212
summary_zh: 采用立体粒子图像测速（SPIV）实验研究了汽车涡轮增压器离心压气机进口湍流特性，重点关注回流时的流动结构。在80-140 krpm转速和整个流量范围内测量了平均速度、涡量、湍动能、雷诺应力和能谱，发现回流后湍动能快速增加且各向异性增强，最大湍动能区域向中心移动。
method: 实验方法：立体粒子图像测速（SPIV），在离心压气机进口无回流通道条件下，覆盖4种转速（80-140 krpm）和全流量范围。
innovation: 首次使用SPIV详细分析离心压气机进口回流时的湍流统计特性，包括湍动能、雷诺应力和能谱，揭示了湍流各向异性和最大湍动能区域迁移规律。
conclusions: 1. 回流发生后，湍动能随流量减小快速增加，且湍流各向异性增强。2. 最大湍动能区域从进口管道外围向中心移动，并向上游迁移。
limitations: 仅针对无回流通道的离心压气机，未涉及旋转不稳定性或叶片振动，且未进行数值验证。
relevance_reason: 论文研究压气机进口湍流和回流特性，与近失速流动相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Wall Heat Loads in a Cryogenic Rocket Thrust Chamber During Thermoacoustic Instabilities
abstract: A subscale, research rocket thrust chamber operating with cryogenic oxygen and hydrogen exhibits self-excited transverse-mode instabilities with amplitudes of more than 80% of the steady combustion chamber pressure (peak-to-peak) for some operating conditions. During unstable combustion, an increase in the integral heat flux into the water-cooled combustion chamber walls of 20–40% with respect to stable conditions was experienced. A model was derived to predict changes in the axial heat flux profile considering only the dependence of flame length on the amplitude of transverse acoustic oscillations. The model predicts an increase in heat flux in the upstream part of the chamber by up to a factor of 7. This drastic increase is in agreement with past observations of rocket engine failures due to instabilities, in which the structural damage is commonly observed on the faceplate and the walls adjacent to the injection plane. The model also predicts a peak increase in integral heat flux of up to about 25%. While falling short of the peak experimental value of 40%, it nevertheless suggests that flame length is the dominant influence on the distribution of thermal loads in this study.

DLR, German Aerospace Center, 74239 Hardthausen, Germany

summary_zh: 本研究针对低温火箭推力室中自激横向热声不稳定性，实验发现不稳定燃烧时壁面热流增加20-40%。建立了仅考虑火焰长度随声振幅变化的模型，预测上游热流可增加7倍，积分热流增加约25%，表明火焰长度是热载荷分布的主导因素。
method: 实验测量与理论建模：采用缩比火箭推力室，使用低温氧氢推进剂，研究自激横向模态不稳定性，并建立火焰长度依赖的解析模型。
innovation: 首次定量关联火焰长度与横向声振荡振幅对壁面热载荷的影响，提出简化模型解释热流分布突变，与发动机失效观测一致。
conclusions: 不稳定燃烧使积分热流增加20-40%，模型预测上游热流可增加7倍，积分热流增加约25%，火焰长度是热载荷分布的关键因素。
limitations: 模型仅考虑火焰长度单一因素，未包含其他热声耦合机制，且实验为缩比模型，可能无法完全代表全尺寸发动机。
relevance_reason: 研究热声不稳定性引起的壁面热载荷变化，与声学诱导振动相关，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: A Study of Influences of Inlet Total Pressure Distortions on Clearance Flow in an Axial Compressor
abstract: Abstract The rotating distortion generated by upstream wakes or low speed flow cells is a kind of phenomenon in the inlet of middle and rear stages of an axial compressor. Highly complex inflow can obviously affect the performance and the stability of these stages, and is needed to be considered during compressor design. In this paper, a series of unsteady computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations is conducted based on a model of a 1-1/2 stage axial compressor to investigate the effects of the distorted inflows near the casing on the compressor performance and the clearance flow. Detailed analysis of the flow field has been performed and interesting results are concluded. The distortions, such as total pressure distortion in circumferential and radial directions, can block the tip region so that the separation loss and the mixing loss in this area are increased, and the efficiency and the total pressure ratio are dropped correspondingly. Besides, the distortions can change the static pressure distribution near the leading edge of the rotor, and make the clearance flow spill out of the rotor edge more easily under near stall (NS) condition, especially in the cases with corotating distortions. This phenomenon can be used to explain why the stall margin is deteriorated with nonuniform inflows.
affiliations: Shanghai Jiao Tong University
School of Mechanical Engineering, Shanghai Jiaotong University, Shanghai 200240, China
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文通过非定常CFD模拟研究轴流压气机进口总压畸变对叶尖间隙流的影响，发现周向和径向畸变会阻塞叶尖区域，增加分离和掺混损失，降低效率和总压比；在近失速条件下，畸变使间隙流更易从转子前缘溢出，导致失速裕度恶化。
method: 基于1.5级轴流压气机模型进行非定常CFD模拟，研究近失速条件下周向和径向总压畸变的影响。
innovation: 揭示了进口总压畸变通过改变转子前缘静压分布促进间隙流溢出的机理，解释了非均匀进气恶化失速裕度的原因。
conclusions: 1. 周向和径向总压畸变增加叶尖区域分离和掺混损失，降低效率和总压比；2. 近失速条件下，畸变使间隙流更易从转子前缘溢出，尤其同向旋转畸变时更显著。
limitations: 仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；仅考虑近失速工况，未涵盖其他运行状态。
relevance_reason: 论文研究畸变进气对叶尖间隙流和失速裕度的影响，与RI-NSV的机理（如叶尖泄漏流不稳定性）间接相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Forced Response Variation of a Compressor Utilizing Blade Tip Timing, Strain Gages, and As-Manufactured Finite Element Models
abstract: Abstract The dynamic response of turbine engine components varies widely due to manufacturing deviations in the blades known as mistuning. This dynamic variation is investigated using a single stage compressor experimentally using both blade tip timing (BTT) and strain gage (SG) measurements and using as-manufactured finite element models (AMMs) on a 1st bend mode. Operational BTT and SG safety limits were generated using both averaged and AMM models via Goodman material properties. The predicted individual blade stress/deflection (S/D) ratios and strain gage ratios for this mode will be compared to the average finite element counterparts. Additionally, the correlation between BTT and SG's will be presented. This correlation will be performed using two approaches: blade maximum stress comparisons and measured response compared to the sensors safety limits. It will be shown that accounting for geometry with AMMs produce more accurate strain gage to BTT correlation compared to average models. An experimental model updating procedure is developed to increase the strain gage to BTT correlation by optimizing the location the BTT optical spot probes measure on the blade chord. Implementing this procedure using as-manufactured models are able to improve strain gage to BTT correlation.

summary_zh: 该研究通过叶尖定时和应变片实验测量，结合制造有限元模型，研究单级压气机叶片由于失谐导致的动态响应变化。开发了实验模型更新程序，优化叶尖定时光学探头位置，提高了应变片与叶尖定时测量的相关性。
method: 实验测量（叶尖定时、应变片）与数值仿真（制造有限元模型）结合，研究1阶弯曲模态下的叶片响应。
innovation: 利用制造有限元模型考虑几何偏差，并开发实验模型更新程序优化叶尖定时探头位置，提高应变片与叶尖定时相关性。
conclusions: 制造有限元模型比平均模型更准确地预测应变片与叶尖定时的相关性；通过优化探头位置可进一步提高相关性。
limitations: 仅针对单级压气机和1阶弯曲模态，未涉及非同步振动或旋转不稳定性。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究失谐导致的强迫响应变化，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但对叶片振动测量和建模有参考价值。

title: Effects of Nonuniform Blade Spacing on Compressor Rotor Flutter Stability
abstract: A generalized flat plate cascade model is used in this study to predict the unsteady aerodynamics of a vibrating blade row with nonuniform blade spacing in subsonic compressible flow. The blade row is assumed to vibrate in an isolated family of blade-dominated modes. The effect of nonuniform blade spacing on compressor rotor flutter stability is demonstrated by case studies based on the geometric and flow conditions of a high-speed three-stage axial research compressor. The results show that nonuniform blade spacing can greatly alter the blades’ aerodynamic damping. At certain vibrational nodal diameters, some blades are destabilized so much that their aerodamping becomes negative. However, negative aerodamping of some blades do not necessarily lead to the instability of the whole blade row. A general multibladed system aeroelastic model is derived to study the effects of the nonuniform blade spacing on rotor stability through an eigenvalue approach. The aerodynamic influence coefficients matrix can be calculated using the generalized flat plate cascade model for a blade row with any user-specified blade spacing patterns. The case studies investigated in this paper show that alternating blade spacing and shifting only one blade position can slightly increase the stability of the least-stable eigenmode, whereas sinusoidal blade spacing has a slightly destabilizing effect. On the other hand, the eigenvectors of the least-stable mode for the nonuniformly spaced blade rows can be significantly different from the uniform blade spacing case.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
Purdue University, West Lafayette, Indiana 47907
summary_zh: 本研究采用广义平板叶栅模型预测非均匀叶片间距下振动叶排的非定常气动特性，基于高速三轴研究压气机几何与流动条件进行案例分析。结果表明非均匀叶片间距可显著改变叶片气动阻尼，某些叶片在特定振动节径下出现负阻尼，但未必导致整排失稳。通过多叶片系统气弹模型的特征值分析发现，交替间距和单叶片移位可略微增加最不稳定模态的稳定性，而正弦间距具有轻微失稳效应。
method: 数值仿真（广义平板叶栅模型）与理论分析（多叶片系统气弹模型），基于高速三轴研究压气机工况。
innovation: 首次系统研究非均匀叶片间距对压气机转子颤振稳定性的影响，揭示了不同间距模式对气动阻尼和模态稳定性的差异化作用。
conclusions: 非均匀叶片间距可导致某些叶片负气动阻尼，但整排稳定性取决于整体模态；交替间距和单叶片移位可略微提高最不稳定模态的稳定性。
limitations: 仅考虑亚声速可压缩流和孤立叶片模态，未涉及跨声速或非定常流动分离效应。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶片气动弹性稳定性，涉及非同步振动（颤振）的预测与控制，与RI-NSV机理相关但未直接研究旋转不稳定性。

title: Adjoint boundary sensitivity method to assess the effect of nonuniform boundary conditions
abstract: The performance of turbomachinery is largely affected by the nonuniform boundary conditions caused by the coupling between neighboring parts, such as the inlet distortion and hot streak. Existing works study this problem by comparing the flow fields with uniform and nonuniform boundary conditions, which is cost extensive. In this work a new and efficient method is developed by computing the sensitivities of arbitrary performance metric relative to the boundary conditions and this method quantitatively describes how the disturbance on the boundary surface affects the performance. The adjoint method popular in the design optimization is extended to current field for the efficient computation of the sensitivity. The extra cost is independent of the number of parameters describing the nonuniform distribution. Accuracy of the adjoint boundary sensitivity is validated against analytical results for a converging–diverging nozzle case. Its applications in a representative case are detailed and discussed in this paper. Current method provides a new tool, also direct guides to minimize the negative effect and improve the performance utilizing the adjoint boundary sensitivity.
affiliations: Tsinghua University
Key Laboratory for Thermal Science and Power Engineering of Ministry of Education, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
summary_zh: 本文提出一种伴随边界灵敏度方法，用于高效评估非均匀边界条件（如进气畸变、热斑）对涡轮机械性能的影响。该方法通过计算性能指标对边界扰动的灵敏度，定量描述边界扰动的影响，且额外成本与描述非均匀分布的参数数量无关。在收敛-扩张喷管算例中验证了准确性，为最小化负面影响和优化性能提供了新工具。
method: 数值方法：伴随边界灵敏度方法，用于计算任意性能指标对边界条件的灵敏度。工况参数未明确，但涉及非均匀边界条件（如进气畸变）。
innovation: 将伴随方法扩展到边界灵敏度计算，高效评估非均匀边界条件的影响，且计算成本与描述非均匀分布的参数数量无关。
conclusions: 1. 伴随边界灵敏度方法能准确预测边界扰动对性能的影响，在收敛-扩张喷管算例中与解析结果吻合。2. 该方法为涡轮机械性能优化提供了直接指导。
limitations: 仅验证了简单喷管算例，未涉及旋转机械或非定常流动，实际应用需进一步验证。
relevance_reason: 论文研究非均匀边界条件对涡轮机械性能的影响，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但畸变进气是RI的可能诱因，具有间接参考价值。

title: Generation Mechanism of Broadband Whoosh Noise in an Automotive Turbocharger Centrifugal Compressor
abstract: Abstract The present study focuses on the acoustics of a turbocharger centrifugal compressor from a spark-ignition internal combustion engine. Whoosh noise is typically the primary concern for this type of compressor, which is loosely characterized by a broadband sound elevation in the 4–13 kHz range. To identify the generation mechanism of broadband whoosh noise, the present study combines three approaches: three-dimensional (3D) computational fluid dynamics (CFD) predictions, experiments, and modal decomposition of 3D CFD results. After establishing the accuracy of predictions, flow structures and time-resolved pressures are closely examined in the vicinity of the main blade leading edge. This reveals the presence of rotating instabilities that may interact with the rotor blades to generate noise. An azimuthal modal decomposition is performed on the predicted pressure field to determine the number of cells and the frequency content of these rotating instabilities. The strength of the rotating instabilities and the frequency range in which noise is generated as a consequence of the rotor-rotating instability interaction correspond well with the qualitative trend of the whoosh noise that is measured several duct diameters upstream of the rotor blades. The variation of the whoosh frequency range between low and high rotational speeds is interpreted through this analysis. It is also found that the whoosh noise primarily propagates along the duct as acoustic azimuthal modes. Hence, the inlet duct diameter, which governs the cut-off frequency for multi-dimensional acoustic modes, determines the lower frequency bound of the broadband noise.

summary_zh: 本研究结合三维CFD、实验和模态分解，揭示了汽车涡轮增压器离心压气机宽带呼啸噪声的产生机制。发现主叶片前缘存在旋转不稳定性，其与转子叶片相互作用产生噪声，噪声频率范围与旋转不稳定性强度及频率对应，且噪声以声学方位角模态沿管道传播，管道直径决定噪声下限。
method: 采用三维CFD预测、实验测量和方位角模态分解方法，研究不同转速下压气机流动与噪声特性。
innovation: 首次通过模态分解将旋转不稳定性与宽带呼啸噪声直接关联，并解释了噪声频率范围随转速变化的机理。
conclusions: 旋转不稳定性与转子叶片相互作用是宽带呼啸噪声的主要来源；噪声以方位角模态传播，管道直径决定其低频截止频率。
limitations: 仅针对特定离心压气机，未考虑叶片振动或结构响应。
relevance_reason: 论文研究了旋转不稳定性及其产生的噪声，但未涉及叶片振动或非同步振动，与RI-NSV机理间接相关。

title: Aerodynamic Loading Considerations of Three-Shaft Engine Compression System During Surge
abstract: Abstract Compressor surge imposes a limit on aero-engine operability and can compromise integrity because of significant aerodynamic loads imparted on the engine components. The aim of this article is to use 3D unsteady computational fluid dynamics (CFD) to predict the surge loadings on a compression system of a modern three-spool engine. The compression system is matched at a high power condition and computations are performed using a whole-assembly approach. In this study, the effect of two types of surge initiation on the maximum loading recorded during surge are studied: throttling of the high pressure compressor (HPC) and turning of the intermediate pressure compressor (IPC) variable stator vanes (VSV). An explanation of the main physical phenomena that contribute to those loadings is offered. It was found that in an aero-engine surge event, the maximum overpressure is driven by a combined effect of the surge shock wave passing and high pressure gas blown toward the front of the engine during depressurization. The amplitude of maximum overpressure is dictated by the compression system exit pressure at the moment of surge inception. The surge initiation via HPC throttling produces larger overpressure and therefore should be considered for design intent.
affiliations: Imperial College London
Imperial College London, London SW7 2AZ, UK
Rolls-Royce (United Kingdom)
Rolls-Royce plc, Derby DE24 8BJ, UK
summary_zh: 本文采用三维非定常CFD模拟三轴发动机压缩系统喘振时的气动载荷，研究了高压压气机节流和中压压气机可调静叶转动两种喘振触发方式的影响，发现最大过压由喘振激波和高压气体前吹共同导致，且高压压气机节流触发产生更大过压。
method: 三维非定常CFD数值仿真，采用整机装配方法，匹配高功率工况，研究两种喘振触发方式。
innovation: 首次使用整机装配方法预测三轴发动机压缩系统喘振载荷，并对比两种喘振触发方式对最大载荷的影响。
conclusions: 喘振最大过压由激波和高压气体前吹共同导致；高压压气机节流触发产生更大过压，应作为设计工况。
limitations: 仅针对高功率工况，未考虑低功率或瞬态工况；未涉及非同步振动或旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 论文研究喘振载荷，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但喘振机理对理解压气机不稳定流动有参考价值。

title: Analysis Method of Nonsynchronous Vibration and Influence of Tip Clearance Flow Instabilities on Nonsynchronous Vibration in an Axial Transonic Compressor Rotor
abstract: Abstract The relationship between the tip clearance flow (TCF) and the blade vibration in the lock-in region was numerically investigated on a transonic rotor. Both the bending (1B) and torsional (8th) modes were analyzed under 0 ND. The time marching method and a single-passage model were used, which were verified by citing and comparing with the results in references. The phase of the TCF (referring to the phase difference between the unsteady pressure caused by the TCF and the blade vibration) changed with the frequency ratio in the lock-in region. The strength of the TCF was influenced slightly by the blade vibration amplitude. A separation method of the unsteady pressure caused by the TCF and the blade vibration was developed and verified at different conditions. The unsteady pressure of nonsynchronous vibration (NSV) was separated into the components of the TCF and the blade vibration under the 1B and 8th modes. The unsteady pressure component of the TCF changed little with the vibration amplitude and mainly existed in the tip area. The unsteady pressure component of the blade vibration was larger at part spans and its distribution depended on the modal shape and the vibration amplitude. The unsteady pressure components of the TCF and the blade vibration determined the aerodynamic work/damping in the lock-in region. The aerodynamic work components of the TCF and the blade vibration increased linearly and at a rate of the square with the vibration amplitude, respectively. TCF was dominant in the initial stage of vibration. With the vibration amplitude increasing, the aerodynamic work done by the unsteady pressure component of the blade vibration gradually caught up. The aerodynamic damping of the TCF changed with the phase of the TCF. TCF provided positive damping at some phases and negative damping at other phases. In the initial stage of vibration, the system was stable at the phases TCF providing positive damping and unstable at the phases of negative damping. NSV occurred only when TCF provided negative damping and the unsteady pressure component of the blade vibration provided positive damping. If the aerodynamic damping of the blade vibration was negative, the vibration would be enlarged until failure. Regardless of other damping forms, the maximum amplitude of NSV can be obtained by calculating the balance of the aerodynamic work. For the 8th mode, the limit amplitude under 0 ND was 0.0926%C, which corresponded to vibration stress of about 60 MPa.
affiliations: Beihang University
School of Energy and Power Engineering, Beihang University, 37 Xueyuan Road, Haidian District, Beijing 100191, China
summary_zh: 本文数值研究跨声速转子叶尖间隙流与叶片非同步振动在锁频区的关系，开发了非定常压力分离方法，发现叶尖间隙流在振动初始阶段占主导，其气动阻尼随相位变化，非同步振动仅当叶尖间隙流提供负阻尼且叶片振动提供正阻尼时发生。
method: 采用时间推进法和单通道模型进行数值仿真，分析0节径下1阶弯曲和8阶扭转模态，通过引用文献结果验证。
innovation: 开发了叶尖间隙流与叶片振动非定常压力分离方法，定量揭示了二者对气动功/阻尼的贡献及振幅依赖关系。
conclusions: 非同步振动仅当叶尖间隙流提供负阻尼且叶片振动提供正阻尼时发生；8阶模态下极限振幅为0.0926%C，对应振动应力约60 MPa。
limitations: 仅考虑0节径模态，未考虑其他阻尼形式，且基于单通道模型可能忽略周向非均匀性。
relevance_reason: 论文直接研究叶尖间隙流不稳定性导致非同步振动的机理，并开发了压力分离方法，属于RI-NSV机理研究。

title: Single Nodal Diameter Excitation of Turbine Blades: Experimental and Theoretical Study
abstract: Abstract Validating simulation results of vibrating turbine blades relies on measurements of realistic or academic cyclic structures on special test rigs. In real operation the blades are excited mainly by aerodynamic forces. For measurements of blade vibration on special test rigs, the excitation should be well known. It is desirable to use excitation spectra that consist of only a few engine order excitations. Especially for nonlinear systems, unwanted excitation orders can possibly lead to nonlinear effects which may interfere with the measurement. To separate different engine orders, an innovative electromagnetic excitation device was developed at the institution to overcome the aforementioned problems. The excitation force spectrum is controlled by a variable air gap over the circumference between device and blade. Any desired engine order excitation can be realized. Additionally, by varying the devices coil current in a harmonic fashion, frequency sweeps at constant speed can be performed. In this paper an extensive study of the excitation force spectrum of the device is conducted. Therefore, theoretical investigations of the expectable spectrum are given under simultaneous variation of air gap geometry and excitation current. These predictions are then validated by experiments featuring a small, academic bladed disk. The vibrations of the blades are measured. The device promises to create well predictable and controllable excitation force spectra which will improve the validation strategy in particular of non-linear simulation tools for the prediction of turbine blade vibrations.
affiliations: Leibniz University Hannover
Institute of Dynamics and Vibration Research, Leibniz University Hannover, 30167 Hannover, Germany
Institute of Dynamics and Vibration Research, Leibniz University Hannover, Hannover 30167, Germany

summary_zh: 本文针对涡轮叶片振动测量中的激励问题，开发了一种新型电磁激励装置，通过控制气隙几何和激励电流实现单一节径激励。理论预测了激励力频谱，并在小型叶盘上进行了实验验证，结果表明该装置能产生可预测、可控的激励频谱，有助于非线性仿真工具的验证。
method: 理论分析与实验验证相结合，通过改变气隙几何和激励电流，在小型学术叶盘上进行频率扫描实验，测量叶片振动响应。
innovation: 提出一种通过可变气隙控制激励力频谱的电磁激励装置，实现单一发动机阶次激励，避免非线性干扰，提升非线性仿真验证精度。
conclusions: 1. 该装置能产生仅含少数发动机阶次的激励频谱，有效分离不同阶次。2. 理论预测与实验测量结果吻合，验证了装置的可预测性和可控性。
limitations: 研究仅限于小型学术叶盘，未考虑真实涡轮叶片复杂工况及气动弹性效应。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究涡轮叶片振动激励方法，与风扇/压气机RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及叶片振动实验测量，对叶片流致振动研究有参考价值。

title: Prediction of the Acoustic Reflection in a Realistic Aeroengine Intake With Three Numerical Methods to Analyze Fan Flutter
abstract: Abstract For a particular range of frequencies, an acoustic coupling between the fan and the air intake can modify fan stability regarding flutter. Previous works have shown that characterizing the reflection on the intake opening might be a crucial element to target operating points for which the risk of acoustic-driven flutter is high. To do so, three methodologies are compared in this article: an aeroelastic computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulation, an acoustic potential simulation, and an analytical model. Each of them has a different fidelity level and computational cost, what makes their usage more beneficial at some step in the design process. It is shown that results of aeroelastic CFD and acoustic potential simulations are in excellent agreement. Fast acoustic simulations are then a good option in the early design process. The analytical model presents an important error mainly on the phase and should be adapted before usage.

summary_zh: 本文研究了真实航空发动机进气道中声学反射对风扇颤振稳定性的影响，比较了气动弹性CFD、声学势流模拟和解析模型三种方法预测进气道开口反射的精度。结果表明，气动弹性CFD与声学势流模拟结果高度一致，而解析模型在相位上存在较大误差。
method: 数值仿真与理论分析：采用气动弹性CFD、声学势流模拟和解析模型三种方法，对比预测进气道声学反射特性。
innovation: 系统比较了不同保真度方法在预测声学驱动颤振风险中的适用性，指出快速声学模拟在早期设计中的优势。
conclusions: 1. 气动弹性CFD与声学势流模拟结果吻合良好。2. 解析模型相位误差较大，需改进后才能使用。
limitations: 仅针对特定频率范围，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
relevance_reason: 研究声学耦合导致的颤振，属于NSV相关范畴，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性RI。

title: Aeroacoustic Coupling Effect During the Ascent of Space Transportation Systems
abstract: After the failure of maiden flight 157 of Ariane 5 Evolution Cryotechnique type A (ECA), the inquiry board responsible for the investigation reported as one of the probable causes the “non-exhaustive definition of the loads to which the Vulcain 2 engine is subjected during flight.” As a result, many research activities were set up with the objective to isolate the driving mechanisms. Driving mechanisms such as pumping, flapping, or swinging were found to excite oscillations in the base region. Despite this finding, the question of why the pressure fluctuations and base flow excitations are especially pronounced in the subsonic to transonic flow regime remained unclear. This question is addressed in the study at hand. Results from the literature are combined with recent wind-tunnel measurements on the base model of a space transportation system. The measurement data were acquired by means of particle image velocimetry, pressure transducers, and high-speed schlieren imaging. The results suggest that an aeroacoustic coupling takes place between a jet noise generation mechanism called screeching and the near-wake dynamics. Due to the nature of both effects, they are likely to reach a resonating frequency during the ascent. The resonant frequency appears to increase unfavorable fluctuations in the base region, which are held responsible for the amplified unsteady loads. A schematic model concept is proposed, which describes the underlying governing mechanism. It provides an explanation for question why buffeting effects are especially amplified in the high subsonic ambient flow regime.
affiliations: Deutsches Zentrum für Luft- und Raumfahrt e. V. (DLR)
DLR, German Aerospace Center, 51147 Cologne, Germany
summary_zh: 研究航天运载器上升段亚声速至跨声速阶段底部区域非定常载荷放大机理。通过风洞实验结合粒子图像测速、压力传感器和高速纹影成像，发现射流啸叫与近尾迹动力学之间的气动声学耦合导致共振频率，加剧底部波动载荷。提出描述该机制的示意图模型。
method: 风洞实验测量，采用粒子图像测速、压力传感器和高速纹影成像，研究亚声速至跨声速流动。
innovation: 首次揭示射流啸叫与近尾迹动力学之间的气动声学耦合是底部非定常载荷放大的主导机制，并建立示意图模型。
conclusions: 1. 射流啸叫与近尾迹动力学在亚声速至跨声速阶段发生气动声学耦合，产生共振频率。2. 该共振频率加剧底部区域波动载荷，导致非定常载荷放大。
limitations: 仅针对航天运载器底部流动，未涉及旋转机械或叶片振动。
relevance_reason: 研究气动声学耦合导致的非定常载荷，与风扇/压气机中声学诱导叶片振动有参考价值，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Effects of Inlet Guide Vanes on the Performance and Stability of an Aeronautical Centrifugal Compressor
abstract: Abstract A research centrifugal compressor stage designed and built by Safran Helicopter Engines is tested at three inlet guide vanes (IGV) stagger angles. The compressor stage includes four blade rows: axial inlet guide vanes, a backswept splittered impeller, a splittered vaned radial diffuser (RD), and axial outlet guide vanes (OGVs). The methodology for calculating the performance is detailed, including the consideration of humidity in order to minimize errors related in particular to operating atmospheric conditions. The shift of the surge line toward lower mass flow rate as the IGV stagger angle increases highly depends on the rotation speed. The surge line shift is very small at low rotation speeds, whereas it significantly increases at high rotation speeds. A first-order stability analysis of the impeller and diffuser sub-components shows that the diffuser (resp. impeller) is the first unstable component at low (resp. high) rotation speeds. This situation is unaltered by increasing the IGV stagger angle. At low rotation speeds below a given mass flow rate, rotating instabilities (RI) at the impeller inlet are detected at zero IGV stagger angle. Their occurrence is conditioned by the relative flow angle at the tip of the leading edge of the impeller. As the IGV stagger angle increases, the mass flow decreases to maintain a given inlet flow angle. Therefore, the onset of the rotating instabilities is delayed toward lower mass flow rates. At high rotation speeds, the absolute flow angle at the diffuser inlet near surge decreases as the IGV stagger angle increases. As a result, the flow is highly alternate over two adjacent channels of the radial diffuser beyond the surge line at IGV stagger angle of 0 deg.
