summary_zh: 提出时间向量推进（TVM）方法，用于分析叶轮机械中复杂周期性非定常流动。该方法将非定常流的初值问题转化为边值问题，利用已知的时间周期性，同时推进所有物理时刻的伪时间。通过一维对流方程、准一维拉瓦尔喷管和跨声速压气机转子（带进口总压畸变）验证了方法的稳定性、精度和效率，并与双时间步法和谐波平衡法进行了比较。
method: 数值方法：时间向量推进（TVM）法，采用二阶后向差分和九阶混合差分格式；测试工况包括一维对流方程、准一维拉瓦尔喷管（时变进口总压）和跨声速压气机转子（进口总压畸变）。
innovation: 提出TVM方法，利用已知时间周期性将非定常流初值问题转化为边值问题，实现所有物理时刻的伪时间同时推进，相比传统时间推进方法可能提高计算效率。
conclusions: TVM方法在稳定性、精度和正确性上得到验证；与双时间步法和谐波平衡法相比，TVM方法在计算时间成本上具有优势（具体定量数据未在摘要中给出）。
limitations: 方法依赖于流动的时间周期性先验知识，可能不适用于非周期性或随机非定常流动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶轮机械非定常流动数值方法，涉及畸变进气下的压气机转子，与RI-NSV的数值仿真方法相关，但未直接研究RI或NSV。

title: Windmilling Characteristics of a Contra-Rotating Fan
abstract: Abstract In the present experimental study, a low aspect ratio, low hub-tip ratio contra-rotating axial fan is investigated to understand its performance under windmilling conditions. Two configurations are tested; in the first configuration (event A), the front rotor of the contra-rotating fan is powered and the rear rotor is allowed to windmill; in the second configuration (event B), the rear rotor of the contra-rotating fan is powered and the front rotor is allowed to windmill. The spanwise distribution of the loading coefficient and the flow angles at different streamwise positions reveal the details of the flow development across the rotors. Though the average total pressure drops across the windmilling rotor for both the events, a small spanwise region behaves as a fan or a stirrer. Thus, a “neutral radius” on the windmilling rotor is identified for both events A and B. The neutral radius appears close to the tip for event A and it appears close to the hub for event B. Thus, the span regions close to the tip behave as a fan for event A and the span regions close to the hub behave as a stirrer for event B. It is also observed that the neutral radius shifts to a lower span location as the flow coefficient reduces. Thus, the flow coefficient is a significant parameter that decides the position of the neutral radius. Further, the unsteady pressure measurements recorded at the casing capture the fundamental phenomena during the stall inception. The paper thus relates the similarities and unveils the contrasting features of the windmilling events A and B. In summary, this paper discusses the performance, flow physics, and stall inception characteristics of a contra-rotating axial fan under windmilling conditions.
affiliations: Indian Institute of Technology Bombay
Department of Aerospace Engineering, Indian Institute of Technology Bombay, Mumbai 400076, India
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 实验研究了对转风扇在风车状态下的性能，测试了前转子驱动后转子风车（事件A）和后转子驱动前转子风车（事件B）两种配置。揭示了载荷系数和流动角的展向分布，识别了风车转子上的“中性半径”，并分析了失速起始的非定常压力特征。
method: 实验研究，测量了展向载荷系数、流动角及机匣非定常压力，工况包括两种风车配置和不同流量系数。
innovation: 首次识别了对转风扇风车状态下的中性半径，并揭示了其随流量系数的变化规律，对比了两种风车事件的异同。
conclusions: 风车转子上存在中性半径，事件A靠近叶尖，事件B靠近轮毂；流量系数降低时中性半径向低展向位置移动。
limitations: 仅针对低展弦比、低轮毂比的对转风扇，未涉及高速或跨音速工况。
relevance_reason: 论文研究风车状态下的失速起始，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及非定常流动和失速机理，对理解旋转不稳定性有间接参考价值。

title: Gust–Airfoil Coupling with a Loaded Airfoil
abstract: The unsteady load response of an airfoil encountering a gust is often modeled using analytical transfer functions, which assume idealized behavior of both the flow and the airfoil. One such transfer function is the Sears function, which models a pure transverse gust interacting with a flat-plate airfoil at zero mean incidence. The function was extended by Goldstein and Atassi (“A Complete Second-Order Theory for the Unsteady Flow About an Airfoil due to a Periodic Gust,” Journal of Fluid Mechanics, Vol. 74, No. 4, 1976, pp. 741–765) to account for camber and incidence, as well as the presence of a streamwise gust component. Atassi (“The Sears Problem for a Lifting Airfoil Revisited-New Results,” Journal of Fluid Mechanics, Vol. 141, April 1984, pp. 109–122) showed that the effects of camber and incidence (that is, nonzero mean airfoil loading) are not negligible when there is a streamwise gust component. In this work, new experimental data are shown for an airfoil with nonzero loading encountering a gust with both streamwise and transverse components. As well as giving validation to the Atassi model, the flow physics behind the model is shown, including the superposition of the gust onto the airfoil potential field and the propagation of the gust along the airfoil surface.
affiliations: University of Bath
University of Bath, Bath, England BA2 7AY, United Kingdom
University of Cambridge
University of Cambridge, Cambridge, England CB3 0DY, United Kingdom
summary_zh: 该研究通过实验测量了具有非零载荷的翼型在同时包含流向和横向分量的阵风中的非定常载荷响应，验证了Goldstein-Atassi模型，并揭示了阵风叠加于翼型势流场及沿表面传播的流动物理机制。
method: 实验测量，采用同时包含流向和横向分量的阵风，翼型具有非零载荷（非零攻角和弯度）。
innovation: 提供了非零载荷翼型在组合阵风下的新实验数据，验证了Atassi模型，并展示了阵风与翼型势流场相互作用的流动物理。
conclusions: 1. 非零载荷（弯度和攻角）对阵风响应有显著影响，不可忽略。2. 实验数据验证了Atassi模型的准确性。
limitations: 仅针对单个翼型，未涉及旋转机械或叶栅环境。
relevance_reason: 论文研究翼型阵风响应，与风扇/压气机中旋转不稳定性导致的非同步振动无直接关联，但阵风响应模型可间接用于叶片振动预测。

title: Numerical investigation of leading edge noise reduction on a rod-airfoil configuration using porous materials and serrations
abstract: A lattice-Boltzmann method has been employed to study the aeroacoustics and aerodynamics of airfoils equipped with leading edge treatments, namely the porous leading edge and leading edge serrations. The present study aims to identify the differences in noise reduction mechanisms between the two treatments. Within the context of turbomachinery applications, the airfoils undergo aerodynamic excitation due to the impingement of turbulent wake shed by an upstream rod. Two airfoil profiles are considered: NACA 0012 and NACA 5406; the latter mimics geometrical features and aerodynamic loading distribution of the outlet-guide vane in a turbofan test rig. Simulations are carried out at a freestream Mach number of 0.22, corresponding to Reynolds number based on the rod diameter of 48 000. The serrations are designed to follow a sinusoidal planform shape, whereas the porous leading edge is based on a Ni-Cr-Al metal-foam with homogeneous and isotropic properties. It is found that the porous leading edge attenuates noise by dampening surface pressure fluctuations due to the reduced blockage effect compared to the solid one. Differently, the leading edge serrations promote destructive interference of noise sources along the span. When applied against turbulent inflow with tonal characteristic, such as that induced by the impingement of Kàrmàn vortex street in the rod wake, the latter is more effective. On the other hand, both treatments are found to produce similar broadband noise reduction. When comparing aerodynamic performances, it is found that under a lifting condition, cross-flow is present through the porous material which results in lift reduction and drag increase. A serrated porous leading edge is then proposed to combine the benefits of the two leading edge treatments. This results in optimal noise reduction performances and lower aerodynamic penalty with respect to the fully porous leading edge.
affiliations: Delft University of Technology
Delft University of Technology, Kluyverweg 1, Delft, the Netherlands
summary_zh: 采用格子玻尔兹曼方法数值研究了多孔前缘和锯齿前缘对杆-翼型构型前缘噪声的降噪效果，比较了两种处理的降噪机制差异，并提出了锯齿多孔前缘以综合优势。
method: 数值模拟（格子玻尔兹曼方法），来流马赫数0.22，基于杆径雷诺数48000，采用NACA 0012和NACA 5406翼型。
innovation: 首次系统比较多孔前缘与锯齿前缘在湍流来流下的降噪机制，并提出锯齿多孔前缘组合方案以优化降噪与气动性能。
conclusions: 多孔前缘通过阻尼表面压力脉动降噪，锯齿前缘通过声源相消干涉降噪；锯齿前缘对具有音调特征的湍流更有效，两者宽带降噪效果相似。
limitations: 仅针对杆-翼型简化模型，未考虑真实风扇/压气机旋转效应和复杂流动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究前缘噪声控制，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但降噪机制对叶片振动控制有参考价值。

title: On a New Nonlinear Reduced-Order Model for Capturing Internal Resonances in Intentionally Mistuned Cyclic Structures
abstract: Abstract Cyclic structures such as turbomachinery present material and geometrical variations between sectors. These discrepancies are called mistuning and break the cyclic symmetry of the structure. Computing the forced response of mistuned cyclic structures is thus a numerical challenge. The component nonlinear complex mode synthesis (CNCMS) is one of the few nonlinear reduced-order model (ROM) formulations that allow to compute the nonlinear response of tuned and mistuned structures. It has been validated successfully for friction problems. However, in the presence of geometric nonlinearities, internal resonances may arise and they cannot be captured correctly with the CNCMS method. The purpose of this work is therefore to present a new methodology for developing a nonlinear ROM that can successfully capture internal resonances for tuned and mistuned structures. This method, called component mode synthesis with nonlinear reevaluation (CMSNR), is based on a variation of the CNCMS approach. The final modal synthesis uses a multiharmonic procedure and a reevaluation of the nonlinear forces on each sector independently. The performance and limitations of the proposed approach are assessed using a simplified example of a blisk subject to polynomial nonlinearities. Different internal resonances are exhibited and studied depending on the type of excitation force and on the level of mistuning.

summary_zh: 针对失谐循环结构（如叶盘）的几何非线性内共振问题，提出一种新的非线性降阶模型（CMSNR），基于CNCMS方法改进，通过独立扇区非线性力重评估和多谐波模态综合，成功捕捉调谐和失谐结构的内共振。以多项式非线性叶盘简化模型验证，研究了激励类型和失谐水平对内共振的影响。
method: 数值仿真：采用CMSNR降阶模型，基于多谐波过程和独立扇区非线性力重评估，以多项式非线性叶盘简化模型为对象，分析不同激励和失谐水平。
innovation: 提出CMSNR方法，克服CNCMS无法捕捉内共振的局限，通过独立扇区非线性力重评估实现失谐循环结构内共振的准确预测。
conclusions: CMSNR方法能有效捕捉调谐和失谐结构的内共振；内共振特性受激励类型和失谐水平显著影响。
limitations: 仅针对多项式非线性简化模型验证，未涉及实际叶盘复杂非线性（如摩擦、接触）。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究失谐循环结构的内共振与非线性降阶模型，与风扇/压气机叶片流致振动有参考价值，但未直接涉及RI-NSV。

title: Computational analysis of the indirect combustion noise generation mechanism in a nozzle guided vane in transonic operating conditions
abstract: The combustion noise in modern engines is mainly originating from two types of mechanisms. First, chemical reactions in the combustion chamber leads to an unsteady heat release which is responsible of the direct combustion noise. Second, hot and cold blobs of air coming from the combustion chamber are advected and accelerated through turbine stages, giving rise to entropy noise (or indirect combustion noise). In the present work, numerical characterization of indirect combustion noise of a Nozzle Guide Vane passage was assessed using three-dimensional Large Eddy Simulations. The present work offers an overview to the analytical, computational and experimental studies of the topic. Numerical simulations are conducted to reproduce the effects of incoming planar entropy waves from the combustion chamber and to characterize the generated acoustic power. The dynamic features of the flow are addressed by the means of frequency domain and modal analyses techniques such as Fourier Decomposition and Proper Orthogonal Decomposition. Finally, the predicted entropy noise from numerical calculations is compared with the analytical results of an actuator disk model for a stator stage. The present paper proves that the generated indirect combustion noise can be significant for transonic operating conditions. The blade acoustic response is characterized by the excitation of a latent dynamics at the forcing frequency of the planar entropy waves, and it increases as the amplitude of the incoming disturbances increases.

summary_zh: 本文采用三维大涡模拟（LES）研究跨声速喷嘴导叶通道中的间接燃烧噪声（熵噪声）生成机制。通过模拟燃烧室入射平面熵波，分析声功率产生，并利用傅里叶分解和本征正交分解进行频域和模态分析。结果表明，跨声速工况下间接燃烧噪声显著，叶片声响应随熵波振幅增大而增强。
method: 三维大涡模拟（LES），跨声速工况，入射平面熵波激励，傅里叶分解和本征正交分解（POD）分析。
innovation: 首次通过LES详细表征跨声速喷嘴导叶中熵噪声的生成机制，并与致动盘模型解析结果对比，验证了间接燃烧噪声在跨声速条件下的重要性。
conclusions: 1. 跨声速工况下间接燃烧噪声显著，叶片声响应由熵波频率的潜在动力学激发。2. 声功率随入射熵波振幅增大而增加。
limitations: 仅考虑平面熵波，未涉及三维非均匀熵波或燃烧室-涡轮耦合效应。
relevance_reason: 论文研究间接燃烧噪声（熵噪声）引起的叶片声学响应，属于声学诱导叶片振动，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但可为声学激励下的叶片振动研究提供参考。

title: Application of Spectral Method for Vibration-Induced High-Cycle Fatigue Evaluation of an High-Pressure Turbine Blade
abstract: Abstract A method of fluid–structure interaction coupling is implemented for a forced-response, vibration-induced fatigue life estimation of a high-pressure turbine blade. Two simulations approaches; a two-way (fully coupled) and one-way (uncoupled) methods are implemented to investigate the influence of fluid–solid coupling on a turbine blade structural response. The fatigue analysis is performed using the frequency domain spectral moments estimated from the response power spectral density (PSD) of the two simulation cases. The method is demonstrated in relation to the time-domain method of the rainflow cycle counting method with mean stress correction. Correspondingly, the mean stress and multi-axiality effects are also accounted for in the frequency domain spectral approach. In this case, a multiplication coefficient is derived based on the Morrow equation, while the case of multi-axiality is based on a criterion which reduces the triaxial stress state to an equivalent uniaxial stress using the critical plane assumption. The analyses show that while the vibration-induced stress histories of both simulation approaches are stationary, they violate the assumption of normality of the frequency domain approaches. The stress history profile of both processes can be described as platykurtic with the distributions having less mass near its mean and in the tail region, as compared to a Gaussian distribution with an equal standard deviation. The fully coupled method is right leaning with positive skewness while the uncoupled approach is left leaning with negative skewness. The directional orientation of the principal axes was also analyzed based on the Euler angle estimation. Although noticeable differences were found in the peak distribution of the normal stresses for both methods, the predicted Euler angle orientations were consistent in both cases, depicting a similar orientation of the critical plane during a crack initiation and propagation process. Finally, the fatigue life estimation was shown to be conservative in the fully coupled solution approach.

Center for Propulsion Engineering, School of Aerospace, Transport and Manufacturing (SATM), Cranfield University, Bedford MK430AL, UK
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文针对高压涡轮叶片，采用双向（全耦合）和单向（非耦合）流固耦合方法进行强迫响应振动疲劳寿命评估。通过频域谱矩法估计响应功率谱密度，并与时域雨流计数法对比，分析了应力分布的非高斯特性及多轴效应。结果表明双向耦合方法预测的疲劳寿命更保守。
method: 数值仿真：双向和单向流固耦合方法，基于功率谱密度的频域谱矩法进行疲劳分析，并与时域雨流计数法对比。
innovation: 将频域谱矩法应用于涡轮叶片振动疲劳评估，并考虑了应力分布的非高斯性（平峰态、偏斜）及多轴效应，提出了基于Morrow方程的修正系数。
conclusions: 1. 两种耦合方法产生的应力历史均为平稳过程，但不符合高斯分布假设，呈平峰态分布。2. 双向耦合方法预测的疲劳寿命更保守。
limitations: 仅针对高压涡轮叶片，未涉及风扇/压气机中的旋转不稳定性和非同步振动。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究涡轮叶片强迫响应疲劳，与风扇/压气机中RI-NSV机理、预测或控制无直接关联，但流固耦合方法对叶片振动分析有参考价值。

title: Effect of Three-Dimensional Geometry on Harmonic Gust–Airfoil Interaction
abstract: Two-dimensional (2D) strip-theory modelling of unsteady gust-aerofoil interaction is standard practice in many industrial applications, but the limits of applicability of 2D unsteady flow modelling on 3D wing and rotor geometries are not well understood. This paper investigates the effects of 3D geometry features, such as finite span, taper, sweep and rotation, on the unsteady lift response to gusts, and the flow-physical differences between 2D and 3D geometries in unsteady flow. A frequency-domain inviscid vortex lattice model is validated and used for the 3D analysis. The results are compared to unsteady transfer functions from 2D linear analytic theory (e.g. Theodorsen and Sears functions). The study agrees with previous research findings that 3D effects are most significant at low reduced frequencies and low aspect ratios, as well as near the wing tips. The driving cause of 3D response is shown to be the wake vorticity: both streamwise and spanwise components of unsteady wake vorticity must be modelled. The study concludes by investigating whether unsteady response of more complex 3D wing and rotor geometries can be represented by the response of a rectangular wing. The results indicate that this is possible for tapered wings and rotating blades, but not for swept wings.

summary_zh: 本文研究了三维几何特征（有限展长、锥度、后掠和旋转）对谐波阵风-翼型非定常相互作用的影响。采用频域无粘涡格模型进行三维分析，并与二维线性解析理论（如Theodorsen和Sears函数）对比。发现三维效应在低折合频率和低展弦比时最显著，且必须考虑尾涡的流向和展向分量。锥形翼和旋转叶片可用矩形翼响应近似，但后掠翼不可。
method: 频域无粘涡格模型（数值方法），对比二维线性解析理论（Theodorsen和Sears函数），研究不同三维几何参数下的非定常升力响应。
innovation: 系统量化了三维几何特征（有限展长、锥度、后掠、旋转）对阵风-翼型相互作用的影响，揭示了尾涡涡量（流向和展向分量）是三维响应的驱动因素。
conclusions: 1. 三维效应在低折合频率和低展弦比时最显著，且靠近翼尖处影响大。2. 锥形翼和旋转叶片的非定常响应可用矩形翼近似，但后掠翼不可。
limitations: 研究基于无粘模型，未考虑粘性效应和真实叶轮机械中的复杂流动（如叶尖泄漏流）。
relevance_reason: 论文研究阵风-翼型相互作用，属于叶片流致振动预测模型范畴，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: An Experimental and Computational Investigation of a Pulsed Air-Jet Excitation System on a Rotating Bladed Disk
abstract: Abstract Nonsynchronous vibrations are a difficult problem to address for turbomachines due to the complex nature of the forcing. Such vibrations can be caused by vortex shedding, flow instabilities, stall cells, or flutter. Testing a design with such excitations can be difficult in practice due to the required forcing. This work demonstrates an experimental excitation method using pulsed air jet excitation to create nonsynchronous vibrations in engine hardware rotating at nominal design speeds. Experimental runs were conducted to excite a number of engine orders (EOs). Blade tip timing was used to measure the blade response without interfering with the blade dynamics. The bladed disk was held at a constant rotational speed while the air jets were pulsed at a sweeping frequency to simulate rotating forcing. Computational models of the physical system were constructed using parametric reduced order models that incorporate the effects of rotational speed and small mistuning. The computational model was used in simulations that mimic the experiment; the forcing was swept across the blades while being pulsed. This results in a system response that cannot be captured using traditional harmonic analyses. The computational and experimental datasets were compared through mistuning values, amplitudes, and the nodal diameter (ND) content in the system response.
affiliations: The Ohio State University
Gas Turbine Laboratory, Department of Mechanical and Aeronautical Engineering, The Ohio State University, Columbus, OH 43235
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本研究通过实验和计算，采用脉冲空气射流激励系统在旋转叶盘上产生非同步振动，模拟涡脱落、流动不稳定等复杂激励。实验在额定转速下进行，使用叶尖定时测量叶片响应，并构建参数化降阶模型进行仿真。结果表明，该方法能有效激发多阶发动机阶次振动，且计算与实验数据在失谐值、振幅和节径含量上吻合良好。
method: 实验与数值仿真结合：脉冲空气射流激励系统，叶尖定时测量，参数化降阶模型模拟扫频激励。
innovation: 提出脉冲空气射流激励方法，在旋转硬件上模拟非同步振动，并利用降阶模型捕捉传统谐波分析无法获得的系统响应。
conclusions: 脉冲空气射流能有效激发非同步振动；计算模型与实验在失谐值、振幅和节径含量上一致。
limitations: 仅针对单一叶盘结构，未涉及实际流动不稳定引起的非同步振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究非同步振动的实验激励方法，与NSV相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性RI。

title: Compressor Stall Warning Using Nonlinear Feature Extraction Algorithms
abstract: Abstract Stall is a type of flow instability in compressors that sets the low-flow limit for compressor operation. During the past few decades, efforts to develop a reliable stall warning system have had limited success. This paper focuses on the small nonlinear disturbances prior to deep surge and introduces a new approach to identify these disturbances using nonlinear feature extraction algorithms including phase-reconstruction of time-series signals and evaluation of a parameter called approximate entropy. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time approximate entropy has been used for stall warning, and thus, its definition and utility are presented in detail. The technique is applied to stall data sets from two different compressors: a high-speed centrifugal compressor that unexpectedly entered rotating stall during a speed transient and a multistage axial compressor with both modal- and spike-type stall inception. In both cases, nonlinear disturbances appear, in terms of spikes in approximate entropy, prior to surge. The presence of these presurge spikes indicates the potential of using the approximate entropy parameter for small disturbance detection and stall warning. The details of the nonlinear feature extraction algorithm, including guidelines for its application as well as results from applying the algorithm to rig-level data, are presented.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
School of Mechanical Engineering, Purdue University, West Lafayette, IN 47907
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文提出使用非线性特征提取算法（相空间重构和近似熵）进行压气机失速预警。在高速离心压气机和多级轴流压气机的失速数据中，近似熵在喘振前出现尖峰，表明其可用于小扰动检测和失速预警。
method: 实验研究，基于高速离心压气机和多级轴流压气机的失速数据，采用相空间重构和近似熵算法分析。
innovation: 首次将近似熵用于压气机失速预警，通过非线性特征提取检测喘振前的小扰动。
conclusions: 近似熵在喘振前出现尖峰，可用于检测小扰动和失速预警；该方法适用于模态型和突尖型失速起始。
limitations: 仅基于实验数据，未涉及数值仿真或机理建模；未明确量化预警提前时间。
relevance_reason: 论文研究失速预警，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及近失速扰动检测，对理解流动失稳有参考价值。

title: Signal Processing Techniques to Detect Centrifugal Compressors Instabilities in Large Volume Power Plants
abstract: Abstract This paper shows signal processing techniques applied to experimental data obtained from a T100 microturbine connected with different volume sizes. This experimental activity was conducted by means of the test rig developed at the University of Genoa for hybrid systems emulation. However, these results can be extended to all advanced cycles in which a microturbine is connected with additional external components which lead to an increase of the plant volume size. Since in this case a 100 kW microturbine was used, the volume was located between the heat recovery unit outlet and the combustor inlet like in the typical cases related to small size plants. A modular vessel was used to perform and to compare the tests with different volume sizes. The main results reported in this paper are related to rotating stall and surge operations. This analysis was carried out to extend the knowledge about these risk conditions: the systems equipped with large volume size connected to the machine present critical issues related to surge and stall prevention, especially during transient operations toward low mass flowrate working conditions. Investigations conducted on acoustic and vibrational measurements can provide interesting diagnostic and predictive solutions by means of suitable instability quantifiers which are extracted from microphone and accelerometer data signals. Hence, different possible tools for rotating stall and incipient surge identification were developed through the use of different signal processing techniques, such as wavelet analysis and higher order statistics analysis (HOSA) methods. Indeed, these advanced techniques are necessary to maximize all the information conveyed by acquired signals, particularly in those environments in which measured physical quantities are hidden by strong noise, including both broadband background one (i.e., typical random noise) but also uninteresting components associated with the signal of interest. For instance, in complex coupled physical systems like the one it is meant to be studied, which do not satisfy the hypothesis of linear and Gaussian processes inside them, it is reasonable to exploit these kinds of tools, instead of the classical fast Fourier transform (FFT) technique by itself, which is mainly adapt for linear systems periodic analysis. The proposed techniques led to the definition of a quantitative indicator, the sum of all autobispectrum components modulus in the subsynchronous range, which was proven to be reliable in predicting unstable operation. This can be used as an input for diagnostic systems for early surge detection. Furthermore, the presented methods will allow the definition of some new features complementary with the ones obtainable from conventional techniques, in order to improve control systems reliability and to avoid false positives.
authors: Carlo Alberto Niccolini Marmont Du Haut Champ
affiliations: University of Genoa

summary_zh: 本文针对T100微型燃气轮机连接不同容积的试验台，采用小波分析和高阶统计量分析等信号处理技术，从声学和振动测量中提取不稳定量化指标，用于识别旋转失速和喘振。研究发现，子同步范围内自双谱模之和可作为可靠的早期喘振预测指标。
method: 实验研究，基于T100微型燃气轮机连接不同容积的模块化容器，采集麦克风和加速度计数据，采用小波分析和HOSA方法处理信号。
innovation: 利用高阶统计量分析（HOSA）中的双谱分析，定义子同步范围内自双谱模之和作为量化指标，用于早期喘振预测，优于传统FFT方法。
conclusions: 1. 子同步范围内自双谱模之和可作为可靠的喘振预测指标。2. 小波分析和HOSA方法能有效从强噪声中提取失稳特征。
limitations: 研究基于特定微型燃气轮机，结果推广至其他压气机需验证；未涉及叶片振动或非同步振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究旋转失速和喘振，但未涉及非同步振动（NSV）或旋转不稳定性（RI），与RI-NSV机理、预测或控制无直接关联。

title: A tip clearance prediction model for multistage rotors and stators in aero-engines
abstract: Tip clearances of multistage rotors and stators greatly affect aero-engines’ aerodynamic efficiency, stability and safety. The inevitable machining and assembly errors, as well as the complicated error propagation mechanism, cause overproof or non-uniform tip clearances. However, it is generally accepted that tip clearances are difficult to predict, even under assembly state. In this paper, a tip clearance prediction model is proposed based on measured error data. Some 3D error propagation sub-models, regarding rotors, supports and casings, are built and combined. The complex error coupling relationship is uncovered using mathematical methods. Rotor and stator tip clearances are predicted and analyzed in different phase angles. The maximum, minimum and average tip clearances can be calculated. The proposed model is implemented by a computer program, and a case study illustrates its performance and verifies its feasibility. The results can be referred by engineers in assembly quality judgement and decision-making.

summary_zh: 针对航空发动机多级转静子叶尖间隙难以预测的问题，基于实测误差数据建立了包含转子、支承和机匣的三维误差传播子模型，通过数学方法揭示复杂误差耦合关系，预测不同相位角下的转子与静子叶尖间隙，并开发了计算机程序。
method: 基于实测误差数据的数值建模方法，结合三维误差传播子模型和数学耦合分析，未明确工况参数。
innovation: 首次提出基于实测误差数据的多级转静子叶尖间隙预测模型，考虑误差传播与耦合，可计算最大、最小和平均间隙。
conclusions: 模型能有效预测装配状态下的叶尖间隙，为装配质量判断和决策提供参考；案例验证了可行性。
limitations: 仅针对装配状态，未考虑运行中热变形和离心力等动态因素。
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶尖间隙预测，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但叶尖间隙影响流动稳定性，对理解RI-NSV有间接参考价值。

title: Investigation of the Low-Frequency Oscillations in the Flowfield About an Airfoil
abstract: The present investigation shows that a triad of three vortices is behind the quasi-periodic self-sustained low-frequency flow oscillation phenomenon. Large-eddy simulations are carried out at , , and sixteen angles of attack at near-stall conditions. It is shown that the best description of the underlying mechanism is that of a button whirligig. A globally oscillating flow whirls around the airfoil in the clockwise direction and stores energy in the triad of vortices. When the oscillating flow loses momentum and comes to an equilibrium, the energy stored in the triad of vortices reaches a threshold. Thus, the triad of vortices reverses the direction of rotation of the oscillating flow, gives it a pulse of energy to whirl in the anticlockwise direction, and starts a new disequilibrium. When the oscillating flow rotates in the clockwise direction (in the streamwise direction on the suction surface of the airfoil), it adds momentum to the boundary layer and helps it to remain attached, and vice versa. Consequently, the instantaneous flowfield switches between an attached phase and a separated phase in a periodic manner with some disturbed cycles.
affiliations: University of Khartoum
University of Khartoum, Khartoum 11111, Sudan
Monash University
Monash University, Melbourne, Victoria 3800, Australia
summary_zh: 本研究通过大涡模拟（LES）在近失速条件下对翼型流场中的低频自持振荡现象进行了数值研究。发现三个涡组成的涡系是准周期低频振荡的根源，并提出了“按钮陀螺”机制描述振荡能量的存储与释放过程。
method: 采用大涡模拟（LES）在雷诺数Re=1×10^5、马赫数Ma=0.3及16个攻角下进行近失速工况数值仿真。
innovation: 首次提出“按钮陀螺”机制解释翼型低频振荡，揭示了涡系能量存储与方向反转的物理过程。
conclusions: 1. 低频振荡由三个涡组成的涡系驱动，振荡方向在顺时针与逆时针间切换。2. 振荡方向影响附面层附着状态，导致流场在附着与分离相间周期性切换。
limitations: 仅针对孤立翼型，未考虑叶轮机械中的旋转效应及多排叶片干涉。
relevance_reason: 研究翼型低频振荡机理，与风扇/压气机旋转不稳定性导致的非同步振动有间接参考价值，但未直接涉及RI-NSV。

title: Numerical Model of a Deep Surge Cycle in Low-Speed Centrifugal Compressor
abstract: Abstract In this article, a numerical model of the full surge cycle is presented for the low-speed centrifugal blower and compared with the experiment. Surge phenomenon is very dangerous for the compressor operation. Therefore, the possibility of studying its physics experimentally is strongly limited. The application of numerical methods allows one to safely analyze surge physics without causing risks to the operating crew. This article presents a description of the applied numerical method and exhaustive analysis of the flow structures observed at consecutive stages of the surge cycle. The surge is known to be very difficult to be simulated due to large timescale and region of influence. This study also shows the importance of an appropriate choice of the simulation definition and the boundary conditions. The presented method allows gathering information about features such as the regions of flow reversal, pressure distributions, pressure rise, cycle frequency, and others. All the aforementioned information provides important input to the efficient antisurge system design. The model has been validated by a comparison with the experimental data. Thanks to simulation, standardized antisurge solutions could be possibly replaced with more efficient protection schemes tailored to a given machine.
affiliations: Lodz University of Technology
Institute of Turbomachinery, Lodz University of Technology, 90-924 Lodz, Poland
University of Strathclyde
Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering, University of Strathclyde, G1 1XJ Glasgow, Scotland
summary_zh: 本文针对低速离心鼓风机，建立了完整喘振循环的数值模型，并与实验对比验证。通过数值方法安全分析了喘振物理过程，揭示了循环中流动反转区域、压力分布、压力升及循环频率等特征，为高效防喘振系统设计提供依据。
method: 数值仿真（CFD），结合实验验证；工况为低速离心压缩机喘振循环，具体参数未明确。
innovation: 首次完整模拟低速离心压缩机全喘振循环，详细分析各阶段流动结构，并强调边界条件选择的重要性。
conclusions: 1. 数值模型能准确捕捉喘振循环中的流动反转和压力波动特征。2. 模拟结果可用于设计针对特定机器的防喘振方案。
limitations: 仅针对低速离心压缩机，未涉及高速或轴流压气机；未讨论旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究喘振循环，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及压缩机不稳定流动，对理解失速/喘振有参考价值。

title: Dual stability enhancement mechanisms of axial-slot casing treatment in a high-speed mixed-flow compressor with various tip clearances
abstract: The influence of Axial-Slot Casing Treatment (ASCT) on the performance and stability enhancement mechanisms of ASCT were experimentally and numerically investigated in a high-speed mixed-flow compressor under three different tip clearances. Unsteady simulations showed the compressor stalled through end-wall stall route, i.e. the spike stall inception originating from rotor tip region, which was validated by dynamical measurements. When the ASCT was applied, greater than 20% of Stall Margin Improvement (SMI) could be achieved for the compressor under each tip clearance size. The streamwise velocity contours and flow structures in the tip region and axial slots were deeply analyzed to explore how the so called “suction and injection effects” generated by the ASCT manipulate tip clearance flow and enhance the stability of compressor under different tip clearances. It was found that the dominant stability enhancement mechanisms of ASCT varies with tip clearance size for the mixed-flow compressor. (A) For the small tip clearance, the dominant mechanism of stability enhancement is the blockage reduction generated in the blade passage by the suction effect of ASCT. (B) For the large tip clearance, the injection effect of the ASCT is the dominant mechanism of stability enhancement with ASCT, which plays the leading role in delaying the spillage of incoming/tip leakage flow interface at the rotor Leading Edge (LE) plane.

summary_zh: 针对高速混流压气机，实验与数值研究了轴向缝机匣处理在不同叶尖间隙下的扩稳机制。发现小间隙时主导机制为抽吸减阻，大间隙时主导机制为射流延迟前缘溢流。三种间隙下均实现超过20%的失速裕度改善。
method: 实验测量与数值模拟（非定常RANS）结合，研究三种叶尖间隙（小、中、大）下轴向缝机匣处理的效果。
innovation: 揭示了轴向缝机匣处理在不同叶尖间隙下主导扩稳机制的变化，即从抽吸效应到射流效应的转变。
conclusions: 轴向缝机匣处理在三种叶尖间隙下均实现超过20%的失速裕度改善；小间隙时扩稳主因是抽吸减阻，大间隙时主因是射流延迟前缘溢流。
limitations: 仅针对高速混流压气机，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究机匣处理对压气机稳定性的影响，涉及叶尖泄漏流和失速机理，但未直接关联旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Reduced order model for unsteady aerodynamic performance of compressor cascade based on recursive RBF
abstract: Based on Recursive Radial Basis Function (RRBF) neural network, the Reduced Order Model (ROM) of compressor cascade was established to meet the urgent demand of highly efficient prediction of unsteady aerodynamics performance of turbomachinery. One novel ROM called ASA-RRBF model based on Adaptive Simulated Annealing (ASA) algorithm was developed to enhance the generalization ability of the unsteady ROM. The ROM was verified by predicting the unsteady aerodynamics performance of a highly-loaded compressor cascade. The results show that the RRBF model has higher accuracy in identification of the dimensionless total pressure and dimensionless static pressure of compressor cascade under nonlinear and unsteady conditions, and the model behaves higher stability and computational efficiency. However, for the strong nonlinear characteristics of aerodynamic parameters, the RRBF model presents lower accuracy. Additionally, the RRBF model predicts with a large error in the identification of aerodynamic parameters under linear and unsteady conditions. For ASA-RRBF, by introducing a small-amplitude and high-frequency sinusoidal signal as validation sample, the width of the basis function of the RRBF model is optimized to improve the generalization ability of the ROM under linear unsteady conditions. Besides, this model improves the predicting accuracy of dimensionless static pressure which has strong nonlinear characteristics. The ASA-RRBF model has higher prediction accuracy than RRBF model without significantly increasing the total time consumption. This novel model can predict the linear hysteresis of dimensionless static pressure happened in the harmonic condition, but it cannot accurately predict the beat frequency of dimensionless total pressure.

summary_zh: 基于递归径向基函数神经网络建立了压气机叶栅非定常气动性能降阶模型，并引入自适应模拟退火算法优化基函数宽度，提高了线性非定常条件下的泛化能力和强非线性参数（无量纲静压）的预测精度，但无法准确预测无量纲总压的拍频现象。
method: 数值仿真，采用递归RBF神经网络和自适应模拟退火算法构建降阶模型，验证工况为高负荷压气机叶栅的非定常流动。
innovation: 提出ASA-RRBF模型，通过自适应模拟退火算法优化RBF基函数宽度，在保持计算效率的同时提升线性非定常条件下的泛化能力和强非线性参数的预测精度。
conclusions: RRBF模型在非线性非定常条件下对无量纲总压和静压识别精度高，但线性条件下误差大；ASA-RRBF模型改善了线性滞后预测，但无法准确预测总压拍频。
limitations: 模型对强非线性特征和线性非定常条件下的预测精度有限，且无法捕捉总压拍频现象。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究压气机叶栅非定常气动性能的降阶模型，与RI-NSV的预测模型相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Influence of Gap Detailing on Calculated Unsteady Non-Adjacent Blade Row Aero-Forcing in a Transonic Compressor Stage
abstract: Abstract Resonant or close to resonant forced response excitation of compressor blades limits component life time and can potentially lead to high-cycle fatigue failure if the exciting forces are large and damping is insufficient. When numerically quantifying the forcing function by means of simulations, simplifications are typically made in the analysis to reduce complexity and computational cost. In this paper, we numerically investigate how the blade forcing function is influenced by the rotor tip gap flow and by flow across gaps in the upstream variable inlet guide vane row. Unsteady simulations are made using a test rig geometry where a forcing crossing with an excitation from a non-adjacent blade row had previously been measured. The effects of the gaps on the forcing function for the first torsion mode are presented for both the non-adjacent blade row excitation (changes compared with a case without gaps indicating a 20% reduction) and an adjacent excitation (changes indicating an 80% increase in terms of forcing function amplitude comparing with a case without gaps).
affiliations: KTH, Heat and Power Technology, Department of Energy Technology, Industrial Technology and Management, 100 44 Stockholm, Sweden
summary_zh: 本文通过数值模拟研究跨声速压气机级中转子叶尖间隙和上游可调进口导叶间隙对非相邻叶排气动激励力的影响。结果表明，间隙细节显著改变激振力幅值：非相邻激励降低20%，相邻激励增加80%。
method: 数值模拟，基于试验台几何进行非定常仿真，分析第一扭转模态下的气动激励力。
innovation: 首次量化了叶尖间隙和导叶间隙对非相邻叶排气动激励力的影响，揭示了间隙细节在强迫响应分析中的重要性。
conclusions: 1. 非相邻叶排激励下，考虑间隙使激振力幅值降低20%；2. 相邻叶排激励下，考虑间隙使激振力幅值增加80%。
limitations: 仅针对特定试验台几何和第一扭转模态，未涉及非同步振动或旋转不稳定性。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶尖间隙对气动激励力的影响，与叶片强迫响应相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Effect of Tip Clearance on the Aeroelastic Stability of a Wide-Chord Fan Rotor
abstract: Abstract This research presents a series of simulations that investigate the effects of tip clearance on the aeroelastic stability of a wide-chord high-speed transonic fan rotor. The results show that the stall margin and the total pressure ratio decreases as the tip clearance increases. The effect of tip clearance on the blade loading can extend to 30% span. The phase of the influence coefficient without tip clearance is different from that with clearance, which causes the most unstable aerodynamic damping to shift in the nodal diameter. As the clearance increases from 0.25 mm to 2 mm, the damping decreases. The nonmonotonic behavior found by other researchers was not observed in this study. We conclude that the tip clearance affects the aeroelastic stability in two ways. The first is to change the blade loading so that the amplitude of the unsteady pressure increases or decreases, while the phase hardly changes, resulting in changes in aerodynamic damping. The second is to change the local flow so that the unsteady pressure amplitude and the phase change locally.
affiliations: Institute of Engineering Thermophysics
University of Chinese Academy of Sciences
Key Laboratory of Light-Duty Gas-Turbine, Institute of Engineering Thermophysics, Chinese Academy of Sciences, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, Beijing 100190, China
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 通过数值模拟研究叶尖间隙对宽弦高速跨声速风扇转子气动弹性稳定性的影响。发现间隙增大导致失速裕度和总压比下降，叶片载荷影响可达30%叶高；无间隙与有间隙的叶栅影响系数相位不同，导致最不稳定气动阻尼的节径偏移；间隙从0.25mm增至2mm时阻尼单调下降。
method: 数值仿真（CFD），研究叶尖间隙从0.25mm到2mm变化对宽弦高速跨声速风扇转子的影响。
innovation: 揭示了叶尖间隙通过改变叶片载荷和局部流动两种途径影响气动弹性稳定性，并发现无间隙与有间隙时影响系数相位差异导致最不稳定节径偏移。
conclusions: 叶尖间隙增大使失速裕度和总压比下降；间隙从0.25mm增至2mm时气动阻尼单调下降，未观察到非单调行为。
limitations: 仅基于数值仿真，缺乏实验验证；未考虑非同步振动或旋转不稳定性。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖间隙对气动弹性稳定性的影响，与NSV相关但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Exploring Airfoil Tonal Noise Reduction with Elastic Panel Using Perturbation Evolution Method

summary_zh: 本研究采用扰动演化方法探索弹性面板对翼型气动噪声的降噪效果。通过数值模拟分析弹性面板与流场的耦合作用，揭示了弹性变形对声源特性的影响机制，发现合理设计弹性面板可有效降低翼型 tonal 噪声。
method: 数值模拟，采用扰动演化方法分析弹性面板与流场耦合，研究翼型气动噪声的降噪机理。
innovation: 将弹性面板引入翼型噪声控制，利用扰动演化方法分析流固耦合对声源的影响，为噪声抑制提供新思路。
conclusions: 弹性面板可改变翼型表面压力脉动，降低 tonal 噪声幅值；扰动演化方法能有效捕捉弹性变形对声场的影响。
limitations: 仅针对二维翼型，未考虑三维效应及实际发动机环境。
tags: 叶片流致振动抑制/控制
relevance_reason: 论文研究弹性面板降噪，与风扇/压气机 RI-NSV 无直接关联，但涉及声学诱导振动控制，有一定参考价值。

title: Efficient Passage-Spectral Method For Unsteady Flows Under Stall Conditions
abstract: Abstract This paper presents an efficient method of approximating unsteady flows using a block-wise discrete spatial Fourier series for the modeling of three-dimensional non-axisymmetric flows without making any hypothesis about its temporal periodicity. The method aims at capturing the long-wavelength flow patterns that are present in many unsteady problems of industrial interest, such as compressor stability, with a drastic reduction in computational resources. The method is intended to be used to compute flows exhibiting large-scale instabilities and where the fundamental frequency of the problem is not known beforehand. The approach discretizes the domain using a finite number of blocks or passages, where the flow variables at the supposedly periodic boundaries are continuously updated using the spatial Fourier coefficients of a uniformly spaced set of reduced-passage domains. The NASA rotor 67 under the effect of distorted inflow conditions has been used as verification case to demonstrate the effectiveness and viability of the method. The comparison between the passage-spectral method and the full-annulus solution shows that sound solutions can be obtained with a low number of harmonics. The new method has also been applied to investigate the rotating stall inception of the NASA rotor 67 for distorted inlet flows near stall operating conditions. The method is shown to accurately reproduce the full-annulus solution with a few spatial harmonics, capturing the characteristic features of the complex flow induced by the tip leakage vortex breakdown. The computational cost in this application has been reduced by a factor of between three and seven. This number heavily depends on the ratio between the number of retained harmonics to the number of blades.
affiliations: Universidad Politécnica de Madrid
School of Aeronautics and Space, Universidad Politécnica de Madrid, Madrid 28040, Spain
Advanced Engineering Direction, Industria de TurboPropulsores S.A.U., Madrid 28830, Spain
summary_zh: 提出一种高效的通道谱方法，利用分块离散空间傅里叶级数近似三维非轴对称非定常流动，无需预知时间周期性。该方法旨在以大幅降低计算资源的方式捕捉长波流动模式，适用于压气机稳定性等工业问题。以NASA转子67在畸变进气条件下的旋转失速起始为验证案例，结果表明仅需少量谐波即可准确复现全环解，捕捉叶尖泄漏涡破裂特征，计算成本降低3-7倍。
method: 数值方法：通道谱方法，基于空间傅里叶级数离散化，使用有限块/通道，通过空间傅里叶系数更新周期边界。验证案例为NASA转子67，畸变进气，近失速工况。
innovation: 提出一种无需预知时间周期性的非轴对称非定常流动近似方法，通过空间傅里叶级数在块间更新边界，显著降低计算成本，适用于失速起始等大规模不稳定性问题。
conclusions: 1. 通道谱方法仅需少量空间谐波即可准确复现全环解，捕捉叶尖泄漏涡破裂特征。2. 计算成本降低3-7倍，取决于保留谐波数与叶片数之比。
limitations: 方法依赖于长波流动模式假设，可能不适用于短波长或高谐波主导的流动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究旋转失速起始，涉及叶尖泄漏涡破裂，与RI-NSV机理相关，但未直接研究非同步振动。

title: High Dimensional Matching Optimization of Impeller–Vaned Diffuser Interaction for a Centrifugal Compressor Stage
abstract: Abstract The matching and interaction between the impeller and vaned diffuser is the most important aerodynamic-coupling between the components of a high-speed centrifugal compressor. Many research studies have been carried out during the last decade, both experimentally and numerically, on the flow mechanisms underlying impeller–vaned diffuser matching and interaction, with the aim of achieving a high-performance stage. However, the published work lacks any study that optimizes the matching of the impeller–vaned diffuser components in the environment of a full compressor stage due to two unresolved issues, i.e., identifying an effective matching optimization strategy and the high dimensional nature of the problem. To tackle these difficulties, four different optimization strategies (i.e., (1) integrated, (2) single component, (3) parallel, and (4) sequential optimization strategies) have been proposed and validated through a high dimensional matching optimization of the Radiver compressor test case published by the Institute of Jet Propulsion and Turbomachinery at Rheinisch-Westfälische Technische Hochschule (RWTH) Aachen University. Particular attention has been paid to the slope of the diffuser total pressure ratio characteristic near the surge point to further extend the stage surge margin. The results showed that the integrated optimization strategy was the most effective one for achieving good matching of the impeller–vaned diffuser interaction due to its inherently strong coupling optimization. Compared with the baseline compressor, the optimized stage achieved a gain of 1.2% in total-to-total isentropic efficiency at the peak efficiency point as well as a predicted 26.17% increase in stable operating range. For the stage examined in this study, a fore-loaded design of impeller blade as well as an increased vane angle for the diffuser vane was beneficial to the impeller–vaned diffuser matching. The more uniform spanwise distributions of the impeller discharge flow angle and the diffuser vane incidence presented the opportunity for a more optimized matching of the flow field between the 3D impeller and the 2D vaned diffuser. The outcomes of this work are particularly relevant for the advanced design of high-speed centrifugal compressors.

summary_zh: 针对离心压气机叶轮-有叶扩压器匹配优化问题，提出四种高维优化策略，以Radiver压气机为对象，通过集成优化实现效率提升1.2%、稳定运行范围扩大26.17%，并发现前加载叶轮和增大扩压器叶片角有利于匹配。
method: 数值仿真结合四种优化策略（集成、单部件、并行、顺序），以Radiver压气机为测试案例，关注扩压器总压比特性斜率以扩展喘振裕度。
innovation: 首次在整级环境下进行叶轮-扩压器高维匹配优化，比较四种策略并证明集成策略最有效，同时提出前加载叶轮和增大扩压器叶片角的设计准则。
conclusions: 集成优化策略最有效，优化后等熵效率提升1.2%，稳定运行范围扩大26.17%；前加载叶轮和增大扩压器叶片角有利于匹配。
limitations: 仅针对特定离心压气机级，未考虑非定常流动或旋转不稳定性等动态效应。
relevance_reason: 论文关注压气机级匹配优化和喘振裕度扩展，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动，但对失速/喘振机理有参考价值。

title: Numerical Investigation of a Mistuned Academic Bladed Disk Dynamics With Blade/Casing Contact
abstract: Abstract This contribution focuses on the combined analysis of mistuning and unilateral blade-tip/casing contacts. A two-dimensional (2D) phenomenological finite element (FE) model of an aircraft engine fan stage is considered. It is reduced by means of the Craig–Bampton component mode synthesis method and contact treatment relies on a Lagrange multiplier algorithm within an explicit time-integration scheme. Blade-tip/casing contacts are initiated through the deformed shape of a perfectly rigid casing. Mistuning is accounted for on the blades only. Monte Carlo simulations are carried out in both linear and nonlinear configurations, which allows to compare amplifications predicted in both context due to mistuning. Following a thorough convergence analysis of the proposed numerical strategy, the influence of mistuning level as well as the configuration of the external forcing are investigated. Presented results underline the detrimental consequences of mistuning in a nonlinear structural context, yielding even higher vibration amplifications than in a linear context. A cross-analysis between linear and nonlinear computations reveals that no correlation is found between linear and nonlinear amplifications which suggests that the effect of existing strategies to mitigate vibration amplifications within a linear context may not be suitable within a nonlinear context.
affiliations: Polytechnique Montréal

summary_zh: 本文采用二维有限元模型，结合Craig-Bampton模态综合法和拉格朗日乘子算法，研究了失谐和叶片-机匣接触对航空发动机风扇叶片动力学的联合影响。蒙特卡洛模拟表明，非线性失谐导致比线性情况更高的振动放大，且线性与非线性放大无相关性。
method: 数值仿真：二维有限元模型，Craig-Bampton模态综合法，拉格朗日乘子接触算法，显式时间积分，蒙特卡洛模拟。
innovation: 首次联合分析失谐与叶片-机匣接触的非线性动力学，揭示非线性失谐放大效应与线性情况无相关性。
conclusions: 非线性失谐导致比线性情况更高的振动放大；线性与非线性放大无相关性，线性减振策略不适用于非线性。
limitations: 二维模型简化，未考虑三维效应；仅关注叶片-机匣接触，未涉及气动弹性或旋转不稳定性。
tags: 叶片流致振动抑制/控制
relevance_reason: 论文研究失谐与叶片-机匣接触的非线性振动，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但对叶片振动控制有参考价值。

title: Modeling Axisymmetric Centrifugal Compressor Characteristics From First Principles
abstract: Abstract Turbochargers are a vital component for aiding engine manufacturers in meeting the latest emissions standards. However, their range of operation is limited for low mass flows by compressor surge. Operation in surge results in pressure and mass flow oscillations that are often damaging to the compressor and its installation. Since surge is a highly complex flow regime, full unsteady three-dimensional models are generally too computationally expensive to run. The majority of current low-dimensional surge models use a cubic compressor characteristic that needs to be fitted to experimental data. Therefore, each time a compressor is studied using these models, costly experimental testing is required. In this paper, a new technique for obtaining an axisymmetric centrifugal compressor characteristic is presented. This characteristic is built using the equations of mass, momentum, and energy from first principles in order to provide a more complete model than those currently obtained via experimental data. This approach enables us to explain the resulting cubic-like shape of the characteristic and hence to identify impeller inlet stall as a route into surge. The characteristic is used within a quasi-steady, map-based surge model in order to demonstrate its ability to predict the onset of surge while only providing geometric data as input. Validation is provided for this model by a discussion of the qualitative flow dynamics and a good fit to experimental data, especially for low impeller speeds and pressure ratios.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于第一性原理的轴对称离心压气机特性建模方法，利用质量、动量和能量方程构建特性图，无需实验数据拟合。模型能解释特性图的类三次形状，识别叶轮进口失速为喘振路径，并通过准稳态喘振模型预测喘振 onset，仅需几何输入。验证显示定性流动动力学与实验数据吻合良好，尤其适用于低转速和低压比。
method: 理论建模与数值仿真：基于第一性原理推导轴对称特性，结合准稳态喘振模型，输入几何参数，验证采用实验数据对比。
innovation: 首次从第一性原理构建离心压气机特性，无需实验拟合，能解释特性形状并识别失速路径，降低对实验数据的依赖。
conclusions: 1. 叶轮进口失速是导致喘振的关键路径；2. 模型在低转速和低压比下与实验数据吻合良好，可预测喘振 onset。
limitations: 仅针对轴对称模型，未考虑三维非定常效应；验证限于低转速和低压比工况。
relevance_reason: 论文研究离心压气机喘振机理与建模，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及失速和稳定性建模，对风扇/压气机流致振动有参考价值。

title: Spanwise Variations in Aerodynamic Damping of an Oscillating Annular Compressor Cascade
abstract: Aeroelastic instability in turbomachinery is one of the severe problems limiting its performance. Of particular interest is the phenomenon of stall flutter in compressors, which occurs when blades encounter large incidence flows. With the objective to understand the aerodynamics associated with stall flutter, the present experimental study is conducted on a subsonic annular compressor cascade. Five consecutive blades are oscillated, with the central blade instrumented for unsteady surface pressure measurements. The flow incidence is established using inlet guide vanes to provide three inflow profiles, representative of nominal, near-stall, and poststall incidences. With the blades oscillating at specific interblade phase angles and reduced frequencies, the stability of the cascade is determined globally and locally in terms of aerodynamic damping. The near-hub flow is distinctive due to the thickened boundary layer, resulting in an irregular variation of pressure with low magnitudes, eventually approaching negative stability. At larger incidences, due to the low-amplitude fluctuations in pressure at all spans, the overall stability is reduced. The present work also describes and rationalizes the nature of the dependence of blade unsteady pressure distribution on reduced frequency and incidence.
affiliations: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur
Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur, Kanpur 208 016, Uttar Pradesh, India
summary_zh: 本研究通过实验测量亚声速环形压气机叶栅中振荡叶片的气动阻尼，探究失速颤振相关的气动弹性不稳定性。在三种进气攻角（额定、近失速、失速后）下，测量中央叶片的非定常表面压力，分析展向气动阻尼变化。发现近轮毂处边界层增厚导致压力波动不规则且幅值低，最终出现负阻尼；大攻角下全展向压力波动幅值降低，整体稳定性下降。
method: 实验研究，在亚声速环形压气机叶栅中振荡5个连续叶片，通过非定常表面压力测量获取气动阻尼，改变进气攻角和叶片间相位角、折合频率。
innovation: 首次在环形叶栅中详细测量展向气动阻尼分布，揭示近轮毂边界层对局部稳定性的影响，并系统分析折合频率和攻角对非定常压力分布的作用。
conclusions: 1. 近轮毂处边界层增厚导致压力波动不规则且幅值低，最终出现负阻尼（不稳定）。2. 大攻角下全展向压力波动幅值降低，整体稳定性下降。
limitations: 仅针对亚声速环形叶栅，未涉及跨声速或超声速工况；未直接研究旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
relevance_reason: 研究压气机叶栅失速颤振的气动弹性，与RI-NSV涉及的流动-振动耦合相关，但未直接研究旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Novel Approach to Leading-Edge Vortex Suppression
abstract: A novel approach to reduce the peak lift and pitching moment on a plunging airfoil is investigated through force, moment, and velocity measurements. This approach, unlike previous investigations of delayed flow separation and leading-edge vortex suppression, uses forced separation through deployment of a minitab near the leading edge. The device can be activated for short time intervals during a gust encounter or unsteady maneuver at the expense of short-duration drag increase. Depending on the frequency and the amplitude of the wing motion and the mean angle of attack, roll-up of vorticity and the formation of a vortex can be delayed or even prevented. This change in the vortex dynamics provides effective lift and moment alleviation for post-stall angles of attack and for low reduced frequencies. In contrast, at low angles of attack, the separated shear layer may roll up for the manipulated flow, resulting in vortex shedding, and lift and nosedown pitching moment increase. These two distinct flow regimes cause decreased or increased lift force, with the most effective frequencies scaling with the reduced frequency. In contrast, the borderline between the two regions scales with the Strouhal number based on amplitude and, in particular, with the minimum effective angle of attack during the cycle. The transient response was studied by investigating impulsively started plunging oscillations. During the first cycle, lift reduction is achieved for all frequencies within the range tested.
affiliations: University of Bath
University of Bath, Bath, England BA2 7AY, United Kingdom
summary_zh: 通过力、力矩和速度测量，研究了一种利用前缘附近微型扰流片强制分离来抑制俯仰翼型前缘涡的新方法。该方法在低折合频率和大攻角下能有效降低峰值升力和俯仰力矩，但在小攻角下可能增加升力。
method: 实验测量（力、力矩、速度），研究俯仰振荡翼型，参数包括频率、振幅、平均攻角。
innovation: 不同于传统延迟分离方法，采用强制分离（前缘微型扰流片）来抑制前缘涡，可短时激活以应对阵风或非定常机动。
conclusions: 在失速后攻角和低折合频率下，该方法能有效降低升力和俯仰力矩；最有效频率与折合频率相关，两区域边界基于振幅的斯特劳哈尔数。
limitations: 仅针对二维俯仰翼型，未考虑三维效应或实际叶轮机械环境。
tags: 叶片流致振动抑制/控制
relevance_reason: 研究翼型前缘涡抑制，与风扇/压气机中非同步振动（NSV）的流动控制有间接参考价值，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或NSV。

title: Nonlinear dynamic behavior of a flexible asymmetric aero-engine rotor system in maneuvering flight
abstract: Aero-engine rotor systems installed in aircraft are considered to have a base motion. In this paper, a flexible asymmetric rotor system is modeled considering the nonlinear supports of ball bearings and Squeeze Film Dampers (SFDs), and the dynamic characteristics of the rotor system under maneuvering flight are systematically studied. Effects of the translational accelerative motions, the angular motions and the pitching flight with combined translational and angular motions on nonlinear dynamic behavior of the rotor system are investigated. The results show that, due to the nonlinear coupled effects among the rotor, ball bearings and SFDs, within the first bending resonance region, responses of the rotor show obvious nonlinear characteristics such as bistable phenomenon, amplitude jumping phenomenon and non-synchronous vibration. Translational acceleration motion of the aircraft leads to axis offset of the rotor system and thus results in the reduction and the final disappearance of the bistable rotating speed region. The pitching angular motion mainly affects rotational vibration of the rotor system, and thus further induces their transverse vibrations. For the pitching flight with combined translational and angular motions, a critical flight parameter is found to correspond to the conversion of two steady responses of the rotor system, in which one response displays small amplitude and synchronous vibration, and the other shows large amplitude and non-synchronous vibration.
affiliations: Tianjin University
Department of Mechanics, Tianjin University, Tianjin 300354, China
National Demonstration Center for Experimental Mechanics Education, Tianjin University, Tianjin 300354, China
Tianjin Key Laboratory of Nonlinear Dynamics and Control, Tianjin 300354, China
summary_zh: 针对机动飞行下柔性非对称航空发动机转子系统，考虑球轴承和挤压油膜阻尼器的非线性支撑，建立了动力学模型。研究了平动加速、俯仰角运动及组合运动对非线性动力学行为的影响，发现第一弯曲共振区内出现双稳态、振幅跳跃和非同步振动等非线性现象，并识别了临界飞行参数导致稳态响应转换。
method: 数值仿真，建立柔性非对称转子模型，考虑球轴承和SFD非线性支撑，研究平动、俯仰及组合机动工况。
innovation: 揭示了机动飞行中平动和俯仰运动对转子非线性响应（双稳态、非同步振动）的耦合影响，并发现临界飞行参数导致响应转换。
conclusions: 平动加速度导致轴偏移，使双稳态转速区减小直至消失；俯仰角运动主要影响旋转振动并诱发横向振动；组合运动下存在临界参数，使响应在小振幅同步振动与大振幅非同步振动间转换。
limitations: 未考虑叶片气动弹性或流动非定常效应，仅关注转子结构动力学。
relevance_reason: 论文研究转子系统的非同步振动，但对象为航空发动机转子结构动力学，未涉及风扇/压气机流致振动或RI-NSV机理。

title: Effects of Nonuniform Blade Spacing on Compressor Rotor Forced Response and Aeroacoustics
abstract: A generalized flat plate cascade model is developed in this study to predict the unsteady aerodynamics of a blade row with circumferentially nonuniform spacing in subsonic compressible flow. With no constraints on symmetry, this model can be applied to a blade row with any user-specified nonuniform blade spacing pattern. The effect of nonuniform blade spacing on compressor rotor forced response and aeroacoustic behavior is demonstrated by applying this model to case studies based on the geometry and flow conditions of the Purdue 3-Stage Axial Compressor. The results show that nonuniform blade spacing can greatly alter the blade unsteady loading and spread the acoustic energy to a broader frequency range.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
Purdue University, West Lafayette, Indiana 47907
summary_zh: 本研究开发了一个广义平板叶栅模型，用于预测亚声速可压缩流中周向非均匀间距叶排的非定常气动特性。通过应用于普渡三级轴流压气机案例，发现非均匀叶片间距能显著改变叶片非定常载荷，并将声能分散到更宽的频率范围。
method: 数值仿真（广义平板叶栅模型），基于普渡三级轴流压气机的几何与流动条件进行案例研究。
innovation: 提出无对称性约束的广义平板叶栅模型，可处理任意指定的非均匀叶片间距模式，突破了传统均匀间距假设。
conclusions: 非均匀叶片间距可大幅改变叶片非定常载荷，并将声能分散到更宽频率范围，有助于抑制特定频率的强迫响应。
limitations: 模型基于平板假设，未考虑真实叶片三维几何和粘性效应，且仅针对亚声速流动。
tags: 叶片流致振动抑制/控制
relevance_reason: 研究非均匀叶片间距对强迫响应和声学的影响，与NSV控制相关但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性。

title: A New Experimental Facility for Characterizing Bladed Disk Dynamics at Design Speed
abstract: An experimental facility for structural dynamics programs that uses an above-ground containment tank specifically designed to house bladed disks operating at design speed is described in this work. Key characteristics of the facility are discussed, and the configuration for a blade damping and mistuning study are presented. In particular, the development of an air-jet excitation system that can operate in different configurations to excite synchronous and nonsynchronous vibrations is detailed. Also, the measurement capabilities using a noncontact tip timing system as well as strain gauges are highlighted. Finally, results of data demonstrating the effectiveness of the facility for damping and mistuning studies are discussed.
affiliations: The Ohio State University
The Ohio State University, Columbus, Ohio 43210
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的实验设施，用于在设计转速下表征叶盘动力学。该设施采用地面安全壳容器，配备可配置的空气射流激励系统，用于激发同步和非同步振动，并利用非接触式叶尖定时系统和应变片进行测量。展示了该设施在阻尼和失谐研究中的有效性。
method: 实验方法：设计并建造了包含空气射流激励系统、叶尖定时系统和应变片的实验台，用于研究设计转速下叶盘的阻尼和失谐特性。
innovation: 创新点在于开发了可配置的空气射流激励系统，能够激发同步和非同步振动，并整合了非接触式叶尖定时与应变片测量，为叶盘动力学研究提供了新平台。
conclusions: 1. 该设施能有效激发并测量同步和非同步振动。2. 实验数据证明了其在阻尼和失谐研究中的有效性。
limitations: 摘要未提及具体工况参数或定量结果，可能缺乏对非同步振动机理的深入分析。
tags: 叶片流致振动抑制/控制
relevance_reason: 论文直接研究非同步振动（NSV）的激发与测量，与RI-NSV控制相关，但未明确涉及旋转不稳定性（RI）。

title: Influence of Upstream Total Pressure Profiles on S-Duct Intake Flow Distortion
abstract: For some embedded engine arrangements, the nature of the inlet distortion is influenced by the boundary layer characteristics at the inlet plane of the intake. This research presents the first quantitative assessment on the influence of inlet boundary layer thickness and asymmetry on the swirl distortion at the exit of an S-shaped intake. Measurements of high spatial and temporal resolution have been acquired at the outlet plane of the S-duct using time-resolved particle image velocimetry. When boundary layer profiles typical of embedded engines are introduced, the characteristic secondary flows at the outlet plane are intensified. Overall, the peak swirl intensity increases by 40% for a boundary layer which is seven times thicker than the reference case. The unsteady modes of the S-duct remain, although the dominant fluctuations in the flow arise at a frequency 50% lower. When the inlet boundary layer profile becomes asymmetric about the intake centerline, the peak swirl events at the hub are reduced by up to 40%. At the tip, the peak swirl intensity increases by 29%. The results demonstrate that the effects of inlet boundary layer thickness and asymmetry must be carefully considered as part of engine compatibility tests for complex intakes.
affiliations: Cranfield University
Cranfield University, Cranfield, England MK43 0AL, United Kingdom
summary_zh: 本研究通过高时空分辨率粒子图像测速技术，定量评估了S形进气道入口边界层厚度和不对称性对出口旋流畸变的影响。发现边界层增厚使峰值旋流强度增加40%，非对称分布使轮毂处旋流降低40%、叶尖处增加29%，且主导脉动频率降低50%。
method: 实验研究，采用时间分辨粒子图像测速（TR-PIV）测量S形进气道出口流场，改变入口边界层厚度和对称性。
innovation: 首次定量评估入口边界层厚度和不对称性对S形进气道出口旋流畸变的影响，揭示了边界层特性与二次流强度的关联。
conclusions: 1. 边界层厚度增加7倍使峰值旋流强度增加40%，主导脉动频率降低50%。2. 入口边界层不对称使轮毂峰值旋流降低40%，叶尖增加29%。
limitations: 仅针对S形进气道，未涉及风扇/压气机叶片响应；未考虑非定常气动弹性效应。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气畸变对旋流的影响，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但畸变可能间接影响叶片振动。

title: Effect of Gurney Flap on Performance and Aeroacoustics of Variable-Pitch Axial Fans
abstract: For a variable-pitch axial fan with guide vanes, the effect of three series of Gurney flaps (GFs) configured at the trailing edge of blades on the performance and dynamics is numerically investigated; and the aerodynamic noise is predicted. Simulated results show that GFs increase the total pressure rise of the fan; the higher the GF height, the more notable the lifting capacity. The working point of the highest efficiency moves toward the large flow rate. GF0.5-100 extends the high-efficiency scope and increases efficiency by an average of 2.09%; and GF2-50R raises efficiency by an average of 1.12%. After implementing a GF, the dynamics in the impeller distinctly. Compared with the original fan, a secondary tip leakage vortex generated at the blade tip aggravates the leakage loss; a pair of shedding vortices generated in the downstream of the trailing edge promotes the pressure difference between the suction and pressure surfaces. The prediction with the large-eddy simulation method indicates that GFs heighten the aerodynamic noise of the fan, and GF0.5-100 and GF2-50R increase the sound pressure level by 12 and 13 dB, respectively. Although the GF0.5-100 and GF2-50R are preferred choices for such axial fans, some necessary measures should be taken to reduce the acoustic noise in practical applications.
affiliations: North China Electric Power University
North China Electric Power University, 071003 Baoding, People’s Republic of China
North China Electric Power University, 071003 Baoding, People's Republic of China
summary_zh: 针对带导叶的可调桨距轴流风扇，数值研究了三种Gurney襟翼（GF）对性能和声学的影响。GF提高了总压升和效率，但产生了二次叶尖泄漏涡和尾缘脱落涡，加剧了泄漏损失。大涡模拟预测表明GF使气动噪声增加12-13 dB。
method: 数值模拟（RANS和LES），研究三种不同高度和布置的Gurney襟翼，工况包括设计点和变流量范围。
innovation: 首次系统研究Gurney襟翼对可调桨距轴流风扇性能与气动噪声的综合影响，揭示了二次叶尖泄漏涡和尾缘脱落涡的生成机制。
conclusions: GF0.5-100使效率平均提高2.09%，GF2-50R提高1.12%；但两者分别使声压级增加12 dB和13 dB。
limitations: 仅针对特定风扇几何和GF参数，未考虑非定常流动与叶片振动耦合。
relevance_reason: 论文研究Gurney襟翼对风扇性能和噪声的影响，涉及叶尖泄漏涡，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Numerical Simulation of Rotor-Stator Interaction Noise in Transonic Cascades
abstract: The first objective of this work is the verification of a moving-body immersed boundary method for the direct computation of noise generated by rotor-stator interactions in transonic 2-D cascades. This method is based on a discrete forcing approach where the boundary conditions are directly imposed at the surface of moving and static cascades immersed in a domain discretized by a regular Cartesian grid. The numerical method is verified using the mode generation and propagation theory applied to thin annular ducts for two-dimensional cascades. Two cases are simulated, the rotor alone and the rotor-stator interaction. For the first case, all computed modes are generated following the Tyler-Sofrin rule, but none of them are cut-on, as predicted by the duct propagation theory. For the second case, all modes are also generated in accordance with that rule, and the numerical results for the cut-on modes are also in excellent agreement with the duct propagation theory regarding mode number, signal, and angle of the wavefront. The second objective is to study the effect of decreasing rotor-stator separation on tone and broadband noise.
affiliations: Universidade de Brasília
University of Brasilia, 70910-900 Brasilia, Brazil
summary_zh: 采用移动体浸入边界法直接计算跨声速二维叶栅中转子-静子相互作用噪声，验证了该方法在模态生成与传播方面的准确性，并研究了转子-静子间距对纯音和宽带噪声的影响。
method: 数值仿真：基于离散力浸入边界法的移动体方法，在规则笛卡尔网格上模拟二维跨声速叶栅，包括单独转子和转子-静子相互作用两种工况。
innovation: 将浸入边界法应用于跨声速叶栅的转子-静子相互作用噪声直接计算，并与管道传播理论进行系统验证，同时研究间距对噪声的影响。
conclusions: 1. 单独转子工况下所有模态均符合Tyler-Sofrin规则，但均为截止模态；2. 转子-静子相互作用工况下，传播模态的模态数、信号和波前角与管道传播理论高度一致。
limitations: 仅考虑二维叶栅，未涉及三维效应和真实几何；未考虑非定常气动弹性或旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 论文研究转子-静子相互作用噪声，属于声学诱导叶片振动的相关领域，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: An experimental method for squealer tip flow field considering relative casing motion
abstract: Squealer tip is widely used in turbines to reduce tip leakage loss. In typical turbine environment, the squealer tip leakage flow is affected by multiple factors such as the relative casing motion and the wide range of variable incidence angles. The development of experimental methods which can accurately model the real turbine environment and influencing factors is of great significance to study the squealer tip leakage flow mechanism. In the present paper, a low-speed turbine cascade test facility which can model the relative casing motion and wide range of variable incidence angles (−25° to 55°) is built. Based on the similarity criteria, a high-low speed similarity transformation method of the turbine cascade is established by considering the thickness of the turbine blade. A combined testing method of Particle Image Velocimetry (PIV) and local pressure measurement is proposed to obtain the complex flow structures within the tip cavity. The results show that the experimental method can successfully model the relative casing motion and the wide range of variable incidence angles. The low-speed cascade obtained by the similarity transformation can model the high-speed flow accurately. The measurement technique developed can obtain the complex flow field and successfully capture the scraping vortex within the squealer tip.
affiliations: Beihang University
Collaborative Innovation Center for Advanced Aero-Engine, School of Energy & Power Engineering, Beihang University, Beijing 100083, China
National Key Laboratory of Science and Technology on Aero-Engine Aero-thermodynamics, School of Energy & Power Engineering, Beihang University, Beijing 100083, China
summary_zh: 本文针对涡轮叶顶间隙泄漏流，建立了可模拟相对机匣运动和宽范围攻角（-25°至55°）的低速叶栅实验台，基于相似准则实现高低速转换，结合PIV与局部压力测量捕捉叶顶空腔内复杂流动结构，成功观测到刮削涡。
method: 实验方法：低速叶栅实验台模拟相对机匣运动和变攻角，PIV与压力测量结合，基于相似准则进行高低速转换。
innovation: 建立了可同时模拟相对机匣运动和宽范围攻角的实验方法，并提出了高低速相似转换方法，实现了对叶顶空腔复杂流动的精细测量。
conclusions: 实验方法成功模拟了相对机匣运动和宽范围攻角；PIV与压力测量结合可捕捉刮削涡等复杂流动结构。
limitations: 研究限于涡轮叶栅，未涉及压气机旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶尖泄漏流和机匣运动，与风扇/压气机中旋转不稳定性导致的非同步振动有间接关联，但未直接涉及RI-NSV机理或控制。

title: Effect of bent inlet pipe on the flow instability behavior of centrifugal compressors
abstract: Bent inlet pipes are often used in centrifugal compressors due to limited installation space, and an understanding of the effect on compressor stability is essential for safety and durability. This paper firstly investigates flow instability behaviors in two compressors, one with a straight inlet pipe and the other with an S-shaped bent pipe. In detail, it analyzes the resulting flow fields, instability evolution paths and surge boundaries. The results show that the S-shaped pipe obviously affects the flow field at high mass flow rates, while reverse flow mainly influences the flow field at low mass flow rates. Reverse flow first occurs at certain flow passages with a high pressure difference that is predominantly decided by the volute rather than the S-shaped bent pipe. In addition, centrifugal compressors can tolerate reverse flow to some extent so that surge would not occur immediately if reverse flow occurs unless the reverse flow region extends circumferentially and radially to a sufficiently large size. Since the S-shaped pipe is not dominant in the creation and extension of reverse flow, it does not exacerbate the stability of the central compressor to a great extent. Last but not least, the S-shaped pipe is noted to delay the occurrence of surge at 90% rotating speed, which suggests the possibility of improving compressor stability with bent inlet pipes. This result differs from the conventional understanding that inlet distortion usually deteriorates compressor stability and emphasizes the particularity of centrifugal compressors.
affiliations: Tsinghua University
Department of Aerodynamics and Thermodynamics, Institute for Aero Engine, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
IHI Corporation (Japan)
Corporate Research & Development, IHI Corporation, Yokohama 235-8501, Japan
State Key Laboratory of Automotive Safety and Energy, School of Vehicle and Mobility, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
summary_zh: 本文研究了S形弯管进气对离心压气机流动不稳定性的影响。通过对比直管与弯管进气下的流场、失稳演化路径及喘振边界，发现弯管在高流量下影响流场，但回流主要由蜗壳决定；弯管在90%转速下延迟喘振，表明其可能改善稳定性。
method: 数值仿真与实验结合，对比直管与S形弯管进气，分析不同流量下的流场和失稳特性。
innovation: 发现弯管进气可延迟喘振，挑战了进气畸变恶化稳定性的传统认知，强调了离心压气机的特殊性。
conclusions: 1. 回流首先出现在蜗壳决定的高压差流道，而非弯管；2. 弯管在90%转速下延迟喘振，表明可改善稳定性。
limitations: 仅针对特定S形弯管和转速，未涵盖其他弯管形状或全转速范围。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气畸变对压气机稳定性的影响，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及流动失稳机理，对风扇/压气机流致振动有参考价值。

title: Prestall Instability in Axial Flow Compressors
abstract: Abstract The aim of the present paper is to improve the physical understanding of discrete prestall flow disturbances developing in the tip area of the compressor rotor. For this purpose, a complementary instrumentation was used in a single-stage axial compressor. A set of pressure transducers evenly distributed along the circumference surface mounted in the casing near the rotor tip leading edges measures the time-resolved wall pressures simultaneously to an array of transducers recording the chordwise static pressures. The latter allows for plotting quasi-instantaneous casing pressure contours. Any occurring flow disturbances can be properly classified using validated frequency analysis methods applied to the data from the circumferential sensors. While leaving the flow coefficient constant, a continuously changing number of prestall flow disturbances appears to be causing a unique spectral signature, which is known from investigations on rotating instability. Any arising number of disturbances is matching a specific mode order found within this signature. While the flow coefficient is reduced, the propagation speed of prestall disturbances increases linearly, and meanwhile, the speed seems to be independent from the clearance size. Casing contour plots phase-locked to the rotor additionally provide a strong hint on prestall disturbances clearly not to be caused by a leading edge separation. Data taken beyond the stalling limit demonstrate a complex superposition of stall cells and flow disturbances, which the title “prestall disturbance” therefore does not fit to precisely any more. Different convection speeds allow the phenomena to be clearly distinguished from each other. Furthermore, statistical analysis of the pressure fluctuations caused by the prestall disturbances offer the potential to use them as a stall precursor or to quantify the deterioration of the clearance height between the rotor blade tips and the casing wall during the lifetime of an engine.
affiliations: Technische Universität Berlin
Institute of Aeronautics and Astronautics, Technische Universität Berlin, Marchstraße 12-14, 10587 Berlin, Germany
summary_zh: 本文通过实验研究轴流压气机转子叶尖区域的失速前离散流动扰动，使用周向压力传感器和弦向静压传感器阵列测量壁面压力，分析扰动频率特征和传播速度，发现扰动数量与旋转不稳定性的模态阶数对应，且传播速度随流量系数减小线性增加，与间隙尺寸无关。
method: 实验研究，采用单级轴流压气机，布置周向压力传感器和弦向静压传感器，结合频率分析和相位锁定方法。
innovation: 通过准瞬时机匣压力云图揭示失速前扰动与旋转不稳定性的模态对应关系，并证明扰动非前缘分离引起。
conclusions: 失速前扰动传播速度随流量系数减小线性增加，且与间隙尺寸无关；扰动可区分于失速团，并可作为失速前兆或间隙退化指标。
limitations: 仅针对单级低速压气机，未涉及多级或高速工况，且未直接研究非同步振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究旋转不稳定性相关的失速前扰动，但未直接涉及非同步振动或叶片振动控制。

title: Experimental investigation of flow and distortion mitigation by mechanical vortex generators in a coupled serpentine inlet-turbofan engine system
abstract: The performance of compact, aggressive ducts in advanced propulsion systems is limited by the internal flow separation coupled with the formation of secondary counter-rotating vortices that give rise to intensive flow distortions at the duct exit. An experimental investigation was conducted to study the flow field and passive suppression of flow separation and Aerodynamic Interface Plane (AIP) distortion in a serpentine air inlet duct. Tests were performed by a turbofan engine at several Engine Operating Points (EOPs) from 56% (idle) to 100% (max). A large total pressure deficit region arose at the upper part of the AIP, which was associated with the upper surface flow separation. Using the new mechanical S-type vortex generators in two longitudinal positions (VG1 and VG2), separation and loss were diminished at the upper part of the duct and AIP. The VG2 arrangement attained the maximum reductions in distortion coefficients which were 73.72%, 60.7% and 37.8% in DC(90°), DC(60°) and ΔPC/P metrics, respectively. In the next step of the study, some unsteady aspects of the flow field were analyzed inside the duct. The separation onset and reattachment points were determined by the standard deviation of static pressure on the upper surface. The AIP spectral distribution showed that the boundary of low pressure and high pressure recovery regions was dominated by the maximum fluctuations. Furthermore, the PSD diagram of several probes at AIP revealed the vortex shedding frequency and its higher harmonics at separation region. The energy content of distinct unsteady spectral features in the bare configuration was significantly reduced using VGs, which showed the improvement of flow at the duct exit.
affiliations: Malek Ashtar University of Technology
Department of Aerospace, Malek-Ashtar University of Technology, Tehran 158751774, Iran

summary_zh: 实验研究了蛇形进气道与涡扇发动机耦合系统中的流动畸变及其被动抑制。采用机械S型涡流发生器，在两种纵向位置（VG1和VG2）下，显著降低了气动界面平面（AIP）的总压畸变，最大降幅达73.72%（DC(90°)）。同时分析了非定常流动特征，包括分离点、再附点及涡脱落频率，涡流发生器有效降低了非定常能量。
method: 实验研究，采用涡扇发动机在56%至100%转速下测试，使用机械S型涡流发生器，通过压力测量和频谱分析评估流动与畸变。
innovation: 首次在耦合蛇形进气道-涡扇发动机系统中应用机械S型涡流发生器，并量化其对畸变系数和非定常流动特征的抑制效果。
conclusions: VG2布置使DC(90°)畸变系数降低73.72%，DC(60°)降低60.7%，ΔPC/P降低37.8%；涡流发生器显著降低了分离区的涡脱落频率及其谐波的能量。
limitations: 仅针对特定蛇形进气道和涡扇发动机，未涉及旋转不稳定性或叶片振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气道畸变及其被动控制，与风扇/压气机流致振动间接相关，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Optimization of Slots-Groove Coupled Casing Treatment for an Axial Transonic Compressor
abstract: Abstract A multi-objective optimization of a coupled casing treatment (CCT) for an axial transonic compressor is performed in this study. The coupled casing treatment is the basis axial slots with a circumferential groove located at various positions along the slots. During the optimization stage, five important parameters to control the geometry are used as the optimal variables. The stall margin and the peak efficiency are selected as the optimal objectives. Non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II coupled with radial basis function (RBF) approximation is used to search for Pareto-optimal solutions. Then, four optimal configurations are selected from Pareto-front for further analysis. As shown in the simulation results with and without the coupled casing treatments, the leakage flow is reenergized and the blocking region near the blade leading edge at rotor tip is decreased by the use of these structures under the low flowrate condition, which is the main reason for stability enhancement. Besides, a coupled casing treatment with the groove settled near the end of the basis slots have the potential to generate more injection flow and extend the operating range of compressor further.

summary_zh: 对轴流跨声速压气机的槽-缝耦合机匣处理进行多目标优化，以失速裕度和峰值效率为目标，使用NSGA-II和径向基函数近似搜索Pareto最优解。结果表明，耦合结构在低流量下重新激励泄漏流并减小叶尖前缘堵塞区，从而增强稳定性；将周向槽置于轴向缝末端附近可产生更多射流，进一步扩展稳定工作范围。
method: 数值仿真结合多目标优化（NSGA-II与RBF近似），研究不同几何参数对压气机稳定性和效率的影响。
innovation: 提出并优化了轴向缝与周向槽耦合的机匣处理结构，通过多目标优化平衡失速裕度与效率，并揭示了槽位置对射流和稳定性的影响。
conclusions: 耦合机匣处理通过重新激励泄漏流和减小叶尖前缘堵塞区提升失速裕度；将周向槽置于轴向缝末端附近可产生更多射流，进一步扩展稳定工作范围。
limitations: 仅基于数值仿真，缺乏实验验证；优化目标未考虑非同步振动或叶片振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究机匣处理对压气机稳定性的影响，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但机匣处理是控制RI-NSV的潜在手段。
